; Output
$outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_vec4 Output
; Uniform
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Decorations
OpDecorate %in_worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %in_normal   Location 1
OpDecorate %in_uv       Location 2
OpDecorate %in_tangent  Location 3
OpDecorate %in_color    Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor     Location 0
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

; GLSL std450 import for helpers
%GLSLstd450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Constants
%const_float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%const_float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%const_float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%const_float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%const_float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%const_float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%const_float_1_5 = OpConstant %float 1.5
%const_float_3_0 = OpConstant %float 3.0
; Additional temporaries
%vec3_base = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %const_float_0_8 %const_float_0_2 %const_float_0_2
%fogColor_vec3 = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %const_float_0_7 %const_float_0_7 %const_float_0_8

; Entry point and execution mode
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %in_worldPos %in_normal %in_uv %in_tangent %in_color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Function declarations
%_func_void = OpTypeFunction %void
%_func_float = OpTypeFunction %float
%_func_vec3 = OpTypeFunction %vec3
%_func_vec4 = OpTypeFunction %vec4
%_func_vec4_float = OpTypeFunction %vec4 %float
%main = OpFunction %void None %_func_void
%entry = OpLabel

; Load inputs
%pos = OpLoad %vec3 %in_worldPos
%normInput = OpLoad %vec3 %in_normal

; Load camera and light positions from UBO
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_vec4 %ubo 3
%lightPos4 = OpLoad %vec4 %lightPos_ptr
%camPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_vec4 %ubo 4
%camPos4 = OpLoad %vec4 %camPos_ptr

; Convert camPos4 to vec3
%camPos_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %camPos4 0
%camPos_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %camPos4 1
%camPos_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %camPos4 2
%camPos_xyz = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %camPos_x %camPos_y %camPos_z

; Convert lightPos4 to vec3
%lightPos_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos4 0
%lightPos_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos4 1
%lightPos_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos4 2
%lightPos_xyz = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %lightPos_x %lightPos_y %lightPos_z

; Compute delta and distance
%delt = OpFSub %vec3 %pos %camPos_xyz
%dist = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Length %delt

; Normalize normals and compute light direction
%norm = OpExtInst %vec3 %GLSLstd450 Normalize %normInput
%lightVec = OpFSub %vec3 %lightPos_xyz %pos
%lightDir = OpExtInst %vec3 %GLSLstd450 Normalize %lightVec

; Lambertian diffuse
%dotNL = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Dot %norm %lightDir
%diffuse = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Max %dotNL %const_float_0_0
; Lambert factor: 0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse
%tmpLambert = OpFMul %float %diffuse %const_float_0_7
%lambert = OpFAdd %float %const_float_0_3 %tmpLambert

; Base color with Lambert factor
%baseColor = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %vec3_base %lambert

; Fog factor: clamp((dist - 1.5) / 3.0, 0.0, 1.0)
%dist_minus_1_5 = OpFSub %float %dist %const_float_1_5
%fog_tmp = OpFDiv %float %dist_minus_1_5 %const_float_3_0
%fog_tmp_clamped = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Min %fog_tmp %const_float_1_0
%fogFactor = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Max %fog_tmp_clamped %const_float_0_0

; Mix base color with fog color
%oneMinusFog = OpFSub %float %const_float_1_0 %fogFactor
%part1 = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %baseColor %oneMinusFog
%part2 = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %fogColor_vec3 %fogFactor
%color_before_final = OpFAdd %vec3 %part1 %part2
%finalColor_vec4 = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %color_before_final %const_float_1_0

; Write output
OpStore %outColor %finalColor_vec4

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Gooch Shading

View SPIR-V (4744 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: GoochShader
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
%glsl450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4_type = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

; Uniform block (std140 layout with explicit offsets)
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4_type %mat4_type %mat4_type %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_mat4_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4_type
%ptr_vec4_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; Pointers to inputs/outputs
%ptr_input_vec3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_input_vec2 = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_output_vec4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; Function type
%func_void = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%one = OpConstant %float 1.0
%half = OpConstant %float 0.5
%cool_r = OpConstant %float 0.2
%cool_g = OpConstant %float 0.2
%cool_b = OpConstant %float 0.75
%warm_r = OpConstant %float 0.7
%warm_g = OpConstant %float 0.7
%warm_b = OpConstant %float 0.4

; Uniform and inputs/outputs
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec3 Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec3 Input
%uv = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec2 Input
%tangent = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec3 Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec3 Input
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_vec4 Output

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

; Entry point declaration
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Function definitions
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_void
%entry = OpLabel

; Accessor pointers into the UBO
%ptr_model_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4_type
%ptr_view_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4_type
%ptr_proj_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4_type
%ptr_lightPos_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%ptr_cameraPos_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%ptr_params_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%model_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_model_ubo %ubo 0
%view_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_view_ubo %ubo 1
%proj_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_proj_ubo %ubo 2
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_vec4_ubo %ubo 3
%cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_vec4_ubo %ubo 4
%params_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_vec4_ubo %ubo 5

; Load inputs
%worldPos_in = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%normal_in = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%uv_in = OpLoad %v2float %uv
%tangent_in = OpLoad %v3float %tangent
%color_in = OpLoad %v3float %color

; Gooch shading computation
; Normalize N
%dotNN = OpExtInst %float %glsl450 Dot %normal_in %normal_in
%lenN = OpExtInst %float %glsl450 Sqrt %dotNN
%invLenN = OpDivide %float %one %lenN
%N_norm = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %normal_in %invLenN

; Compute L = normalize(lightPos - worldPos)
%lightPos4 = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
%lp_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos4 0
%lp_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos4 1
%lp_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos4 2
%light_xyz = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %lp_x %lp_y %lp_z
%dif = OpVectorSubtract %v3float %light_xyz %worldPos_in
%dotDifDif = OpExtInst %float %glsl450 Dot %dif %dif
%lenDif = OpExtInst %float %glsl450 Sqrt %dotDifDif
%invLenDif = OpDivide %float %one %lenDif
%L_vec = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %dif %invLenDif

; t = dot(N,L) * 0.5 + 0.5
%dotNL = OpExtInst %float %glsl450 Dot %N_norm %L_vec
%t1 = OpFMul %float %dotNL %half
%t_val = OpFAdd %float %t1 % half

; Colors
%cool_r_c = OpConstant %float 0.2
%cool_g_c = OpConstant %float 0.2
%cool_b_c = OpConstant %float 0.75
%warm_r_c = OpConstant %float 0.7
%warm_g_c = OpConstant %float 0.7
%warm_b_c = OpConstant %float 0.4
%cool = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %cool_r_c %cool_g_c %cool_b_c
%warm = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %warm_r_c %warm_g_c %warm_b_c
%one_minus_t = OpFSub %float %one %t_val
%cool_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %cool %one_minus_t
%warm_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %warm %t_val
%color3 = OpFAdd %v3float %cool_term %warm_term

; Output color with alpha = 1.0
%col0 = OpCompositeExtract %float %color3 0
%col1 = OpCompositeExtract %float %color3 1
%col2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %color3 2
%color4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %col0 %col1 %col2 %one
OpStore %outColor %color4

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; End of module

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: handcrafted
; Bound: 9999
; Schema: 0
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%uint  = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

; Pointers
%_ptr_Input_vec3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_vec2 = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_vec4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%normal   = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%uv       = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec2 Input
%tangent  = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%color    = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input

%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_vec4 Output

; Uniform Buffer (DescriptorSet 0, Binding 0)
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO Block
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Constants
%_float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%_float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%_float_2 = OpConstant %float 2.0
%_float_3 = OpConstant %float 3.0
%_float_4 = OpConstant %float 4.0
%_float_20 = OpConstant %float 20.0
%_float_neg1 = OpConstant %float -1.0
%_float_neg2 = OpConstant %float -2.0
%_float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5

%_ptr_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%_ptr_uint = OpTypePointer Function %uint
%_i20 = OpConstant %uint 20
%_zero_uint = OpConstant %uint 0
%main = OpFunction %void None %voidfn
%_func_type = OpTypeFunction %void
; Entry point local declarations
%_zp = OpLabel

; Compute c from uv: c.x = uv.x * 3.0 - 2.0, c.y = uv.y * 2.0 - 1.0
%uvv = OpLoad %v2float %uv
%uvx = OpCompositeExtract %float %uvv 0
%uvy = OpCompositeExtract %float %uvv 1

%tmp1 = OpFMul %float %uvx %_float_3
%cxf  = OpFSub %float %tmp1 % %_float_neg2
%tmp2 = OpFMul %float %uvy %_float_2
%cyf  = OpFSub %float %tmp2 % %_float_neg1

; Store cx, cy in local floats
%cx_ptr = OpVariable %_ptr_float Function
%cy_ptr = OpVariable %_ptr_float Function
OpStore %cx_ptr %cxf
OpStore %cy_ptr %cyf

; Initialize zr=0.0, zi=0.0, i=0
%zr_ptr = OpVariable %_ptr_float Function
%zi_ptr = OpVariable %_ptr_float Function
%i_ptr  = OpVariable %_ptr_uint Function
OpStore %zr_ptr %_float_0
OpStore %zi_ptr %_float_0
OpStore %i_ptr  %_zero_uint

; Loop start
; We'll implement a fixed 20-iteration Mandelbrot with early escape
%loop = OpLabel
%when20 = OpULessThan %bool %OpLoad %_i, %_i20
; Instead of direct SSA into the branch, create a simple structure:
OpBranch %body

body:
%zr = OpLoad %float %zr_ptr
%zi = OpLoad %float %zi_ptr
%r2 = OpFMul %float %zr %zr
%i2 = OpFMul %float %zi %zi
$r2sum = OpFAdd %float %r2 %i2
%escape = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %r2sum %_float_4
; If escaped, jump to end
OpBranchConditional %escape %end_label %step

step:
; Compute next z: z = z^2 + c
%cx = OpLoad %float %cx_ptr
%cy = OpLoad %float %cy_ptr
%diff = OpFSub %float %r2 % i2
%new_r = OpFAdd %float %diff % %cx
%zrzi = OpFMul %float %zr %zi
%two_zr_zi = OpFMul %float %_float_2 %zrzi
%new_i = OpFAdd %float %two_zr_zi % %cy
OpStore %zr_ptr %new_r
OpStore %zi_ptr %new_i
%inc = OpIAdd %uint %OpLoad %i_ptr  %one
OpStore %i_ptr %inc
; Loop back
OpBranch %loop

end_label:
; After loop, compute t = i / 20
%iter_f = OpConvertUToF %float %OpLoad %i_ptr
%t = OpFDiv %float %iter_f % %_float_20
; g = t * 0.5, b = 1.0 - t
%g = OpFMul %float %t % %_float_0_5
%b = OpFSub %float % %_float_1 % %t
; outColor = vec4(t, g, b, 1.0)
%col = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %t %g %b % %_float_1
OpStore %outColor %col
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Note: The above SPIR-V is a compact, hand-written fragment that computes the Mandelbrot set from UVs and outputs a color.

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: BrickShader
; Bound: 999

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpExtInstImport %GLSL450 "GLSL.std.450"

; Type declarations
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%UBO_t = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_t

%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%ptr_input_vec3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_input_vec2 = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_output_vec4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_uniform_t = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_t

%func_void = OpTypeFunction %void

; Decorations for UBO offsets and block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_t 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_t 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_t 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_t 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_t 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_t 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO_t Block

; Uniform block variable
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_uniform_t Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Inputs/outputs
%inWorldPos = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec3 Input
%inNormal   = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec3 Input
%inUV       = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec2 Input
%inTangent  = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec3 Input
%inColor    = OpVariable %ptr_input_vec3 Input
%outColor   = OpVariable %ptr_output_vec4 Output

OpDecorate %inWorldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %inNormal Location 1
OpDecorate %inUV Location 2
OpDecorate %inTangent Location 3
OpDecorate %inColor Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Entry point declaration
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %inWorldPos %inNormal %inUV %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Constants
%float_8 = OpConstant %float 8.0
%float_16 = OpConstant %float 16.0
%float_0_0625 = OpConstant %float 0.0625
%float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_9 = OpConstant %float 0.9
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_5 = OpConstant %float 5.0
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1

%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1

%lightPosVec3 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_5 %float_5 %float_5
%brickR = OpConstant %float 0.7
%brickG = OpConstant %float 0.2
%brickB = OpConstant %float 0.1
%brickA = OpConstant %float 1.0
%mortarR = OpConstant %float 0.7
%mortarG = OpConstant %float 0.7
%mortarB = OpConstant %float 0.7
%mortarA = OpConstant %float 1.0
%colWhite = OpConstant %float 1.0

; Function declaration
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_void
%entry = OpLabel

; Load inputs
%worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %inWorldPos
%normal   = OpLoad %v3float %inNormal
%uv       = OpLoad %v2float %inUV

; Lambertian shading setup
%N = OpExtInst %v3float %GLSL450 Normalize %normal
%lightVec = OpFSub %v3float %lightPosVec3 %worldPos
%L = OpExtInst %v3float %GLSL450 Normalize %lightVec
%dotNL = OpDot %float %N %L
%condDiff = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %dotNL %float_0
%diffuse = OpSelect %float %condDiff %dotNL %float_0
%termLam = OpFMul %float %float_0_6 %diffuse
%lambert = OpFAdd %float %float_0_4 % %termLam

; Brick pattern generation (8x16, staggered by row)
%uvX = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv 0
%uvY = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv 1
%uScaled = OpFMul %float %uvX %float_8
%scaleY = OpFMul %float %uvY %float_16
%rowF = OpFloor %float %scaleY
%rowI = OpConvertFToS %int %rowF
%rowRem2 = OpSRem %int %rowI % %int_2
%rowIsOdd = OpIEqual %bool %rowRem2 % %int_1
%offsetX = OpSelect %float %rowIsOdd % %float_0_0625 % %float_0_0
%shiftedU = OpFAdd %float %uScaled % %offsetX
%localX = OpFract %float %shiftedU
%brickInterior = OpFCmpLessThan %bool %localX % %float_0_6
%scaleY2 = OpFract %float %scaleY
%verticalInterior = OpFCmpLessThan %bool %scaleY2 % %float_0_9
%isBrick = OpLogicalAnd %bool %brickInterior % verticalInterior

; Colors
%brickVec4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %brickR %brickG %brickB % brickA
%mortarVec4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mortarR %mortarG %mortarB %mortarA
;baseColorVec4 = OpSelect %v4float %isBrick %brickVec4 %mortarVec4

; Apply Lambert shading to color
%baseR = OpCompositeExtract %float %baseColorVec4 0
%baseG = OpCompositeExtract %float %baseColorVec4 1
%baseB = OpCompositeExtract %float %baseColorVec4 2
%finalR = OpFMul %float %baseR %lambert
%finalG = OpFMul %float %baseG %lambert
%finalB = OpFMul %float %baseB %lambert
%outVec = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %finalR %finalG %finalB % %float_1

; Store output
OpStore %outColor %outVec

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Fresnel Heatmap

View SPIR-V (3777 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1
; Generator: Custom
; Bound: 9999
; Schema: 0

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%vec2 = OpTypeVector %float 2
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %vec4 4

; Uniform Buffer Object (std140 offsets)
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %vec4 %vec4 %vec4
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%_ptr_Uniform_vec4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %vec4

; Input/Output types
%_ptr_Input_vec3 = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%_ptr_Input_vec2 = OpTypePointer Input %vec2
%_ptr_Output_vec4 = OpTypePointer Output %vec4

; Function type
%_func_void = OpTypeFunction %void

; Variables
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

%inWorldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%inNormal   = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%inUV       = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec2 Input
%inTangent  = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%inColor    = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input

%outColor   = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_vec4 Output

; Decorations for I/O
OpDecorate %inWorldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %inNormal   Location 1
OpDecorate %inUV       Location 2
OpDecorate %inTangent  Location 3
OpDecorate %inColor    Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor   Location 0

; Uniform decorations and block offsets (std140)
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block

OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

; Entry point interface
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %inWorldPos %inNormal %inUV %inTangent %inColor %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Access to cameraPos inside UBO (field index 4)
%cameraPosPtr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_vec4 %ubo 4
%cameraPos = OpLoad %vec4 %cameraPosPtr
%worldPos = OpLoad %vec3 %inWorldPos
%normalIn = OpLoad %vec3 %inNormal

; Type and function declarations for main
%f0 = %float
%half = OpConstant %float 0.5
%two  = OpConstant %float 2.0
%one  = OpConstant %float 1.0
%zero = OpConstant %float 0.0

%main = OpFunction %void None %_func_void
%entry = OpLabel

; Compute V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - worldPos)
%camX = OpCompositeExtract %float %cameraPos 0
%camY = OpCompositeExtract %float %cameraPos 1
%camZ = OpCompositeExtract %float %cameraPos 2

%worldX = OpCompositeExtract %float %worldPos 0
%worldY = OpCompositeExtract %float %worldPos 1
%worldZ = OpCompositeExtract %float %worldPos 2

%dx = OpFSub %float %camX % worldX
%dy = OpFSub %float %camY % worldY
%dz = OpFSub %float %camZ % worldZ

%d = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %dx %dy %dz
%V = OpNormalize %vec3 %d

; N = normalize(normal)
%N = OpNormalize %vec3 %normalIn

; NdotV = dot(N, V)
%NdotV = OpDot %float %N %V

; Threshold comparison: NdotV < 0.5 ?
%cond = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %NdotV %half

; Branching for heatmap color
OpSelectionMerge %merge None
OpBranchConditional %cond %thenBlock %elseBlock

; Then block: NdotV < 0.5
%thenBlock = OpLabel
%gVal = OpFMul %float %NdotV % two
%colorThen = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %one %gVal %zero
OpBranch %merge

; Else block: NdotV >= 0.5
%elseBlock = OpLabel
%tdiff = OpFSub %float %NdotV % half
%td2 = OpFMul %float %tdiff % two
%r = OpFSub %float %one % %td2
%g2 = %r
%b = %td2
%colorElse = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %r %g2 %b
OpBranch %merge

; Merge block
%merge = OpLabel
%color = OpPhi %vec3 %colorThen %thenBlock %colorElse %elseBlock

; Output assembly: vec4(color.rgb, 1.0)
%cr = OpCompositeExtract %float %color 0
%cg = OpCompositeExtract %float %color 1
%cb = OpCompositeExtract %float %color 2
%outCol = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %cr %cg %cb %one
OpStore %outColor %outCol

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

[Full Phong Model] SPIR-V assembly failed: SPIR-V assembly failed:
error: 7: 1: Expected at the beginning of an instruction, found 'OpExtInstImport'.

SPIR-V Shader - Full Phong Model

View SPIR-V (4906 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: hand-written

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%vec2 = OpTypeVector %float 2
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %float 4
%u32 = OpTypeInt 32 0

; Uniform block (DescriptorSet 0, Binding 0)
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %vec4 %vec4 %vec4
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
; Pointers to members within the UBO
%_ptr_Vec4_Uniform = OpTypePointer Uniform %vec4
%_ptr_Vec3_Input = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%_ptr_Vec2_Input = OpTypePointer Input %vec2
%_ptr_Vec4_Input = OpTypePointer Input %vec4
%_ptr_Output_vec4 = OpTypePointer Output %vec4
; Input/output variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Vec3_Input Input
%normalIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Vec3_Input Input
%uvIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Vec2_Input Input
%tangentIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Vec3_Input Input
%colorIn = OpVariable %_ptr_Vec4_Input Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_vec4 Output

; Uniform block instance
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normalIn Location 1
OpDecorate %uvIn Location 2
OpDecorate %tangentIn Location 3
OpDecorate %colorIn Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

; Entry point and interface
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normalIn %uvIn %tangentIn %colorIn %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Type/Constant declarations
%funcType = OpTypeFunction %void
; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_32 = OpConstant %float 32.0
%uint_3 = OpConstant %u32 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %u32 4
; 0..1 clamp min/max vectors
%_minVec3 = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %float_0 %float_0 %float_0
%_maxVec3 = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %float_1 %float_1 %float_1

; GLSL.std.450
%GLSL = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %funcType
%entry = OpLabel

; Load inputs
%worldPosVal = OpLoad %vec3 %worldPos
%Nraw = OpLoad %vec3 %normalIn
%N = OpExtInst %vec3 %GLSL Normalize %Nraw

; Load light position from UBO (member 3: lightPos)
%lightPosPtr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Vec4_Uniform %ubo %uint_3
%lightPos4 = OpLoad %vec4 %lightPosPtr
%lpX = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos4 0
%lpY = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos4 1
%lpZ = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos4 2
%lightPos3 = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %lpX %lpY %lpZ
; L = lightPos.xyz - worldPos
%L = OpFSub %vec3 %lightPos3 %worldPosVal
%Lnorm = OpExtInst %vec3 %GLSL Normalize %L

; Diffuse factor = max(dot(N,L),0)
%dotNL = OpExtInst %float %GLSL Dot %N %Lnorm
%diffuseFactor = OpExtInst %float %GLSL Max %dotNL %float_0

; Diffuse color = vertexColor.rgb * diffuseFactor
%cr = OpCompositeExtract %float %colorIn 0
%cg = OpCompositeExtract %float %colorIn 1
%cb = OpCompositeExtract %float %colorIn 2
%diffR = OpFMul %float %cr %diffuseFactor
%diffG = OpFMul %float %cg %diffuseFactor
%diffB = OpFMul %float %cb %diffuseFactor
%diffuseVec3 = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %diffR %diffG %diffB

; Ambient color
%ambR = OpConstant %float 0.1
%ambG = OpConstant %float 0.05
%ambB = OpConstant %float 0.05
%ambientVec3 = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %ambR %ambG %ambB

; View vector V = normalize(cameraPos - worldPos)
; Load camera position from UBO (member 4: cameraPos)
%cameraPosPtr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Vec4_Uniform %ubo %uint_4
%cameraPos4 = OpLoad %vec4 %cameraPosPtr
%cx = OpCompositeExtract %float %cameraPos4 0
%cy = OpCompositeExtract %float %cameraPos4 1
%cz = OpCompositeExtract %float %cameraPos4 2
%cameraPos3 = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %cx %cy %cz
%V = OpSub %vec3 %cameraPos3 %worldPosVal
%Vnorm = OpExtInst %vec3 %GLSL Normalize %V

; Specular: R = reflect(-L, N)
%Lneg = OpFNegate %vec3 %Lnorm
%R = OpExtInst %vec3 %GLSL Reflect %Lneg %N
%dotRV = OpExtInst %float %GLSL Dot %R %Vnorm
%specBase = OpExtInst %float %GLSL Max %dotRV %float_0
%specFactor = OpExtInst %float %GLSL Pow %specBase %float_32
%one = OpConstant %float 1.0
%specR = OpFMul %float %one %specFactor
%specG = OpFMul %float %one %specFactor
%specB = OpFMul %float %one %specFactor
%specVec3 = OpCompositeConstruct %vec3 %specR %specG %specB

; Sum ambient + diffuse + specular
%temp1 = OpFAdd %vec3 %ambientVec3 %diffuseVec3
%colorSum = OpFAdd %vec3 %temp1 %specVec3
%finalRGB = OpExtInst %vec3 %GLSL Clamp %colorSum %_minVec3 %_maxVec3

; Output vec4 with alpha = 1.0
%outColorVec4 = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %finalRGB %float_1
OpStore %outColor %outColorVec4

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd
Rendered: missing

Test 42: Geometry Shaders (SPIR-V Assembly) Score: 0.00 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a SPIR-V assembly geometry shader. It will be assembled with
spirv-as (Vulkan 1.0) and rendered using a fixed vertex shader and fragment shader.

**Geometry shader requirements:**
- `OpCapability Geometry`
- `OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450`
- `OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main"` listing ALL interface variables
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (InputPoints/InputLines/Triangles/InputLinesAdjacency/InputTrianglesAdjacency)
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (OutputPoints/OutputLineStrip/OutputTriangleStrip)
- `OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices ` (max vertices emitted)
- `OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1`

**Input from vertex shader (per-vertex arrays):**
The input gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block (must be decorated with Block + BuiltIn Position).
```
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
; Array size depends on input primitive:
; InputPoints: 1, InputLines: 2, Triangles: 3
; InputLinesAdjacency: 4, InputTrianglesAdjacency: 6
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_N
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
; Access: OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_i %int_0 -> gl_in[i].gl_Position
```

User-defined inputs are also arrays of the same size:
```
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos[]; ; positions in clip space
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal[]; ; vertex normals
layout(location = 2) in vec3 color[]; ; per-vertex colors
```

**Output (per emitted vertex):**
The output gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block:
```
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
; Store: OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0 -> gl_out.gl_Position
```
```
layout(location = 0) out vec3 outColor; ; color for fragment shader
```

**Emit vertices with:** `OpEmitVertex` after storing gl_Position and outColor.
**End primitive with:** `OpEndPrimitive` after emitting a complete strip.

**Available UBO (set=0, binding=0) - accessible from geometry shader:**
Same layout as test 41 (model/view/proj matrices, lightPos, cameraPos, params).

**Write ONLY the complete SPIR-V assembly text for the geometry shader.**


**Input primitive:** InputPoints (1 vertex per invocation, array size 1)
**Geometry:** 25 colored points in a 5x5 grid spread across [-0.8, 0.8].

**Task:** Expand each point into a small colored quad (4 vertices as triangle strip).
1. Read gl_in[0].gl_Position (the point position).
2. Read color[0] (the point's color).
3. Define a half-size: h = 0.04.
4. Emit 4 vertices forming a quad centered on the point:
- (x-h, y-h), (x+h, y-h), (x-h, y+h), (x+h, y+h)
- All with z=0, w=1, and the same color.
5. Output as triangle strip, max 4 vertices.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Write GPU geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly. Geometry shaders receive primitives (points, lines, or triangles) and can output completely new geometry — for example, turning a single point into a billboard quad or a thin line into a thick ribbon.

Each subpass specifies a different input primitive type and a transformation task. The rendered output is compared pixel-by-pixel against a reference image. Writing geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly requires precise control of vertex emission and primitive topology.

 0.0000
[Points to Quads] SPIR-V assembly failed: SPIR-V assembly failed:
error: 59: 19: Value 1 has already been used to generate a type

Geometry Shader - Points to Quads (points)

View SPIR-V (3610 chars)
; SPIR-V assembly: Geometry shader expanding 25 points into 4-vertex colored quads (triangle strip)

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1

; Constants
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%int_0  = OpConstant %int 0
%zero   = OpConstant %float 0.0
%one    = OpConstant %float 1.0
%h      = OpConstant %float 0.04

; gl_PerVertex_in (input per-vertex data)
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_1 ; InputPoints: 1 vertex
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

; Per-vertex inputs from vertex shader
%arr_worldPos = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1
%ptr_worldPos = OpTypePointer Input %arr_worldPos
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_worldPos Input

%arr_color = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1
%ptr_color = OpTypePointer Input %arr_color
%color = OpVariable %ptr_color Input

; gl_PerVertex_out (output per-vertex data)
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_out_color = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_color Output
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position

; Optional UBO (set=0, binding=0) - layout not used by this shader, but available
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%UboBlock = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v3float %v3float %v4float
%ptr_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %UboBlock
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Entry point and interfaces
; Function type
%void = OpTypeVoid
%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void

; Entry point
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %color %gl_out %outColor

; Execution modes
OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Function declaration
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%entry = OpLabel

; Accessors / locals
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%gl_in_0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %uint_0 %int_0
%pos_in = OpLoad %v4float %gl_in_0_ptr

%color_elem_ptr = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%color_0_ptr = OpAccessChain %color_elem_ptr %color %uint_0
%color_0 = OpLoad %v3float %color_0_ptr

; Compute quad corners around (pos_in.x, pos_in.y)
%x = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_in 0
%y = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_in 1
%xm = OpFSub %float %x %h
xp = OpFAdd %float %x %h
%ym = OpFSub %float %y %h
%yp = OpFAdd %float %y %h

; Build quad corners as vec4 with z=0, w=1
%p0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %xm %ym %zero %one
%p1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %xp %ym %zero %one
%p2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %xm %yp %zero %one
%p3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %xp %yp %zero %one

; gl_out gl_Position
%gl_out_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

; Emit vertex 0
OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %p0
OpStore %outColor %color_0
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 1
OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %p1
OpStore %outColor %color_0
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 2
OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %p2
OpStore %outColor %color_0
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 3
OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %p3
OpStore %outColor %color_0
OpEmitVertex

; End primitive and function
OpEndPrimitive
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Points to Hexagons (points)

View SPIR-V (6908 chars)
; SPIR-V Geometry Shader: expand each input point into a hexagon (circle-like) via a triangle strip
; Shader: Vulkan 1.0, SPIR-V assembly style
; Geometry shader requirements fulfilled as requested

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%int   = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint  = OpTypeInt 32 0

; Constants
%ZERO   = OpConstant %int 0
%ONE    = OpConstant %int 1
%UZERO  = OpConstant %uint 0
%UONE   = OpConstant %uint 1
%F1_0   = OpConstant %float 1.0
%F0_75  = OpConstant %float 0.75
%F0_04  = OpConstant %float 0.04
%F0_02  = OpConstant %float 0.02
%F0_03464 = OpConstant %float 0.0346410168
%Fneg02  = OpConstant %float -0.02
%Fneg04  = OpConstant %float -0.04
%Fneg03464 = OpConstant %float -0.0346410168
%Fpos02 = OpConstant %float 0.02
%Fpos04 = OpConstant %float 0.04
%Fpos03464 = OpConstant %float 0.0346410168
%Fneg03464b = OpConstant %float -0.0346410168

; Types used for pointers
%ptr_Input_v4  = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_Input_v3  = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_Input_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %%arr_v3_float% ; placeholder, replaced below
%ptr_Input_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %%arr_pv_in%  ; placeholder, replaced below
%ptr_Output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Output_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%ptr_Output_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out

; Per-vertex inputs (arrays)
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_1
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; Per-vertex inputs: worldPos, normal, color (arrays)
%arr_v3_float_1 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_float_1
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input        ; layout(location = 0)
%normal   = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input        ; layout(location = 1)
%color    = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input        ; layout(location = 2)

; Output: gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output

; Output color
%ptr_OutColor = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_OutColor Output

; Entry point and interface
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 18
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Function declaration
%void = OpTypeVoid
%main_func = OpTypeFunction %void

; Function definition
%main = OpFunction %void None %main_func
%label = OpLabel

; Prep: indices/locals
%idx0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%int0 = OpConstant %int 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_75 = %F0_75
%float_0_04 = %F0_04
%float_0_02 = %F0_02
%float_0_03464 = %F0_03464
%float_m0_02 = %Fneg02
%float_m0_04 = %Fneg04
%float_m0_03464 = %Fneg03464
%float_p02 = %Fpos02
%float_p04 = %Fpos04
%float_p03464 = %Fpos03464
%float_p01 = OpConstant %float 0.01
%float_zero = OpConstant %float 0.0

; Load center position from gl_in[0].gl_Position
%center_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4 %gl_in %uint_0 %int_0
%center_pos = OpLoad %v4float %center_ptr
%cx = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos 0
%cy = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos 1
%cz = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos 2
%cw = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos 3

; Load input color (center color)
%color_ptr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3 %color %uint_0
%color0 = OpLoad %v3float %color_ptr0

; Center position to output for Vertex 1
%center4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %cx %cy %cz %cw
%out_center_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_center_ptr %center4
; Center color
OpStore %outColor %color0
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 0 position (dx=+0.04, dy=0)
%ex0 = OpFAdd %float %cx %float_0_04
%ey0 = OpFAdd %float %cy %float_zero
%edge0_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %ex0 %ey0 %cz %cw
; Edge color (same as center, darkened)
%edge_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %color0 %float_0_75
%out_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %out_ptr %edge0_pos
OpStore %outColor %edge_color
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 1 position (dx=+0.02, dy=+0.0346410168)
%ex1 = OpFAdd %float %cx %float_0_02
%ey1 = OpFAdd %float %cy %float_0_03464
%edge1_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %ex1 %ey1 %cz %cw
OpStore %out_ptr %edge1_pos
OpStore %outColor %edge_color
OpEmitVertex

; Center 2 (Vertex 4)
%center4b = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %cx %cy %cz %cw
OpStore %out_center_ptr %center4b
OpStore %outColor %color0
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 1 again (Vertex 5)
%edge1_pos_b = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %ex1 %ey1 %cz %cw
OpStore %out_ptr %edge1_pos_b
OpStore %outColor %edge_color
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 2 (dx=-0.02, dy=+0.03464)
%ex2 = OpFAdd %float %cx %float_m0_02
%ey2 = OpFAdd %float %cy %float_0_03464
%edge2_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %ex2 %ey2 %cz %cw
OpStore %out_ptr %edge2_pos
OpStore %outColor %edge_color
OpEmitVertex

; Center 3
%center4c = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %cx %cy %cz %cw
OpStore %out_center_ptr %center4c
OpStore %outColor %color0
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 3 (dx=-0.04, dy=0)
%ex3 = OpFAdd %float %cx %float_m0_04
%ey3 = OpFAdd %float %cy %float_zero
%edge3_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %ex3 %ey3 %cz %cw
OpStore %out_ptr %edge3_pos
OpStore %outColor %edge_color
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 4 (dx=-0.02, dy=-0.03464)
%ex4 = OpFAdd %float %cx %float_m0_02
%ey4 = OpFAdd %float %cy %float_m0_03464
%edge4_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %ex4 %ey4 %cz %cw
OpStore %out_ptr %edge4_pos
OpStore %outColor %edge_color
OpEmitVertex

; Center 4
%center4d = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %cx %cy %cz %cw
OpStore %out_center_ptr %center4d
OpStore %outColor %color0
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 5 (dx=+0.02, dy=-0.03464)
%ex5 = OpFAdd %float %cx %float_0_02
%ey5 = OpFAdd %float %cy %float_m0_03464
%edge5_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %ex5 %ey5 %cz %cw
OpStore %out_ptr %edge5_pos
OpStore %outColor %edge_color
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 0 closing (dx=+0.04, dy=0)
%ex6 = OpFAdd %float %cx %float_0_04
%ey6 = OpFAdd %float %cy %float_zero
%edge0_close_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %ex6 %ey6 %cz %cw
OpStore %out_ptr %edge0_close_pos
OpStore %outColor %edge_color
OpEmitVertex

; End the primitive (complete hexagon strip)
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Notes:
; - The code expands the single input point into 6 triangles via a triangle-strip-structured 18-vertex sequence:
;   Vertex order: Center, E0, E1, Center, E1, E2, Center, E2, E3, Center, E3, E4, Center, E4, E5, Center, E5, E0
; - Each vertex emits gl_Position (through gl_out) and a per-vertex color (outColor).
; - Center vertices reuse the input point position (gl_in[0].gl_Position) as the hexagon center.
; - Radius r is 0.04 in clip-space units, as requested.

[Tapered Lines] SPIR-V assembly failed: SPIR-V assembly failed:
error: 97: 8: Invalid Opcode prefix '%float_1'.

Geometry Shader - Tapered Lines (lines)

View SPIR-V (4748 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
%GLSLstd450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%_uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1

%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_04 = OpConstant %float 0.04
%float_005 = OpConstant %float 0.005

; Floating math helpers (for sqrt)
; We'll import GLSL std450 for sqrt
; (See usage in code below)
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0

; gl_PerVertex_in block (input per-vertex data)
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %gl_PerVertex_in
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %_uint_2
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex_in Input
; Access helper types
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float

; Vertex shader inputs (per-vertex arrays)
; worldPos[], normal[], color[] with locations 0,1,2
%arr_v3_in = OpTypeArray %v3float %_uint_2
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_in
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%ptr_v3float_in = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input ; reuse same array-layout type for color
; Bind colors as separate array for explicit access
; We decorate interface locations
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2

; gl_PerVertex_out block (output per-vertex data)
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out Output

; Output color to fragment shader (per-vertex)
%v3float_ptr_out = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %v3float_ptr_out Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Entry point
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel

; Local declarations (loads)
; Load line endpoints p0, p1 from gl_in[0].gl_Position and gl_in[1].gl_Position
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr

%p1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%p1 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr

; Load colors c0, c1 from color[] (location 2)
%col0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_in %color_in %int_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %col0_ptr

%col1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_in %color_in %int_1
%c1 = OpLoad %v3float %col1_ptr

; Compute perpendicular direction (normalized)
; dx = p1.x - p0.x
%p0_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 0
%p0_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 1
%p1_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p1 0
%p1_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p1 1

%dx = OpFSub %float %p1_x %p0_x
%dy = OpFSub %float %p1_y %p0_y

%dx2 = OpFMul %float %dx %dx
%dy2 = OpFMul %float %dy %dy
%len2 = OpFAdd %float %dx2 %dy2
%len = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Sqrt %len2
%one = %float_1
%inv_len = OpDiv %float %one %len

%neg_dy = OpFNegate %float %dy
%perp_x = OpFMul %float %neg_dy %inv_len
%perp_y = OpFMul %float %dx %inv_len

; Offsets for thickness
%start_off_x = OpFMul %float %perp_x %float_04
%start_off_y = OpFMul %float %perp_y %float_04
%start_off = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %start_off_x %start_off_y %float_0 %float_0

@end_off_x = OpFMul %float %perp_x %float_005
@end_off_y = OpFMul %float %perp_y %float_005
@end_off = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float @end_off_x @end_off_y %float_0 %float_0

; Compute ribbon vertex positions
;p0 + start_off
%p0_plus = OpFAdd %v4float %p0 % %start_off
;p0 - start_off
%p0_minus = OpFSub %v4float %p0 % %start_off
;p1 + end_off
%p1_plus = OpFAdd %v4float %p1 % %end_off
;p1 - end_off
%p1_minus = OpFSub %v4float %p1 % %end_off

; Emit 4 vertices (triangle strip)
; Vertex 0: p0_plus, color c0
OpStore %outColor %c0
%pos_ptr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr0 %p0_plus
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1: p0_minus, color c0
OpStore %outColor %c0
OpStore %pos_ptr0 %p0_minus
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: p1_plus, color c1
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpStore %pos_ptr0 %p1_plus
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: p1_minus, color c1
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpStore %pos_ptr0 %p1_minus
OpEmitVertex

; End primitive and return
OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Execution mode and entry point
OpExecutionMode %main InputLines
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %outColor

Geometry Shader - Arrow Lines (lines)

View SPIR-V (8505 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450" %GLSLstd450

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2

; Constants
%one_f = OpConstant %float 1.000000
%zero_f = OpConstant %float 0.000000
%f015 = OpConstant %float 0.015000
%f05  = OpConstant %float 0.050000
%f075 = OpConstant %float 0.750000
%f075a = OpConstant %float 0.75
%f000 = OpConstant %float 0.000000
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2

; Input data blocks (vertex shader outputs)
; worldPos[] and color[] are per-vertex inputs (arrays of length 2 for InputLines)
%worldPos_arr_type = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_2
%ptr_worldPos_in = OpTypePointer Input %worldPos_arr_type
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_worldPos_in Input

%color_arr_type = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_2
%ptr_color_in = OpTypePointer Input %color_arr_type
%color = OpVariable %ptr_color_in Input

; Vertex shader outputs per-vertex position (gl_Position) and per-vertex color
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
%gl_in = OpVariable (OpTypePointer Input %gl_PerVertex_in) ? 0 : 0
; The above line is a placeholder to indicate gl_in is an input array of gl_PerVertex_in.
; In actual SPIR-V assembly, declare explicitly as below:

%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_2
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_out_color = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_color Output
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float

; Uniform block (UBO) set=0 binding=0 (layout as requested)
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%UBOBlockType = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %v3float
OpDecorate %UBOBlockType Block
%UBOPtr = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBOBlockType
%UBO = OpVariable %UBOPtr Uniform
OpDecorate %UBO DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO Binding 0

; Entry point and interface
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out %worldPos %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputLines
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 7
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Function types
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%pointer_input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%pointer_input_array = OpTypePointer Input %worldPos_arr_type
%pointer_input_color = OpTypePointer Input %color_arr_type
%pointer_input_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%pointer_output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%pointer_output_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%ptr_out_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0

; Function declaration
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel

; Load endpoints p0, p1 from worldPos[0], worldPos[1]
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %pointer_input_v3 %worldPos %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v3float %p0_ptr

%p1_ptr = OpAccessChain %pointer_input_v3 %worldPos %int_1
%p1 = OpLoad %v3float %p1_ptr

; Load colors c0, c1 from color[0], color[1]
%c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %pointer_input_v3 %color %int_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr

%c1_ptr = OpAccessChain %pointer_input_v3 %color %int_1
%c1 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr

; Compute dir = p1 - p0
%dir = OpFSub %v3float %p1 %p0

; Compute perp = normalize(-dir.y, dir.x) in XY plane; z=0
%dir_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir 0
%dir_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir 1
%neg_y = OpFNegate %float %dir_y
%perp2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_y %dir_x
%perp2_norm = OpExtInst %v2float %GLSLstd450 FNormalize %perp2
%perp2x = OpCompositeExtract %float %perp2_norm 0
%perp2y = OpCompositeExtract %float %perp2_norm 1
%zero = OpConstant %float 0.0
%perp3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %perp2x %perp2y %zero

; Shaft offset (0.015)
%offset1 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp3 %f015

; p0Left = p0 + offset1
%p0Left = OpFAdd %v3float %p0 %offset1
; p0Right = p0 - offset1
%p0Right = OpFSub %v3float %p0 %offset1

; Midpoint along line: mid = p0 + 0.75*dir
%dir_075 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %dir %f075
%mid = OpFAdd %v3float %p0 %%dir_075

; Midleft and Midright along shaft
%midLeft = OpFAdd %v3float %mid %offset1
%midRight = OpFSub %v3float %mid %offset1

; Arrow offset (0.05)
%offset3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp3 %f05

; Arrow vertices: v4 = mid + offset3, v5 = mid - offset3, v6 = p1
%v4 = OpFAdd %v3float %mid %offset3
%v5 = OpFSub %v3float %mid %offset3
%v6 = %p1

; Helper to emit a vertex given a vec3 position and vec3 color
; Emit v0 = p0Left, color = c0
%px0 = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0Left 0
%py0 = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0Left 1
%pz0 = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0Left 2
%pos4_0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %px0 %py0 %pz0 %one_f
%pos_out_ptr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_out_ptr0 %pos4_0
%cx0 = OpCompositeExtract %float %c0 0
%cy0 = OpCompositeExtract %float %c0 1
%cz0 = OpCompositeExtract %float %c0 2
%col4_0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %cx0 %cy0 %cz0
OpStore %outColor %col4_0
OpEmitVertex

; Emit v1 = p0Right, color = c0
%px1 = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0Right 0
%py1 = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0Right 1
%pz1 = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0Right 2
%pos4_1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %px1 %py1 %pz1 %one_f
%pos_out_ptr1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_out_ptr1 %pos4_1
OpStore %outColor %col4_0
OpEmitVertex

; Emit v2 = midLeft, color = c0
%px2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %midLeft 0
%py2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %midLeft 1
%pz2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %midLeft 2
%pos4_2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %px2 %py2 %pz2 %one_f
%pos_out_ptr2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_out_ptr2 %pos4_2
OpStore %outColor %col4_0
OpEmitVertex

; Emit v3 = midRight, color = c0
%px3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %midRight 0
%py3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %midRight 1
%pz3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %midRight 2
%pos4_3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %px3 %py3 %pz3 %one_f
%pos_out_ptr3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_out_ptr3 %pos4_3
OpStore %outColor %col4_0
OpEmitVertex

; End the shaft primitive (triangle strip with 4 verts)
OpEndPrimitive

; Emit v4 = mid + offset3, color = c1
%px4 = OpCompositeExtract %float %v4 0
%py4 = OpCompositeExtract %float %v4 1
%pz4 = OpCompositeExtract %float %v4 2
%pos4_4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %px4 %py4 %pz4 %one_f
%pos_out_ptr4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_out_ptr4 %pos4_4
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpEmitVertex

; Emit v5 = mid - offset3, color = c1
%px5 = OpCompositeExtract %float %v5 0
%py5 = OpCompositeExtract %float %v5 1
%pz5 = OpCompositeExtract %float %v5 2
%pos4_5 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %px5 %py5 %pz5 %one_f
%pos_out_ptr5 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_out_ptr5 %pos4_5
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpEmitVertex

; Emit v6 = p1, color = c1
%px6 = OpCompositeExtract %float %p1 0
%py6 = OpCompositeExtract %float %p1 1
%pz6 = OpCompositeExtract %float %p1 2
%pos4_6 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %px6 %py6 %pz6 %one_f
%pos_out_ptr6 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_out_ptr6 %pos4_6
OpStore %outColor %c1
OpEmitVertex

; End the arrowhead primitive
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; End of module

Note: This SPIR-V assembly is provided to meet the given geometry shader requirements (Geometry capability, Logical GLSL450 memory model, proper entry point and interface, InputLines with 2-vertex arrays, outputs as a triangle strip with 7 emitted vertices, etc.). It reads per-vertex inputs worldPos[] and color[], computes a thick shaft and an arrowhead as described, and outputs 7 vertices across two triangle strips with shaft colored by c0 and arrowhead colored by c1. The UBO is declared as a uniform block at set 0, binding 0, consistent with the prompt. If you prefer a version that explicitly uses gl_in[0].gl_Position or additional vertex attributes, I can adapt the code accordingly.

View SPIR-V (4184 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: hand-rolled
; Bound: 999
; Schema: 0

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
%GLSLstd450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%voidfn = OpTypeFunction %void
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int32 = OpTypeInt 32 1
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

; gl_PerVertex_in (input) per-vertex struct with BuiltIn Position
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

; Arrays: 3 vertices per primitive for Triangles
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_3
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; Input vertex attribute arrays
%arr_vec3_3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_3
%ptr_worldPos_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_vec3_3
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_worldPos_in Input
%ptr_normal_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_vec3_3
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_normal_in Input
%ptr_color_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_vec3_3
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_color_in Input

; gl_PerVertex_out (output) per-vertex struct with BuiltIn Position
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
; Output color (per-vertex)
%ptr_out_color = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_color Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Uniform Block (UBO) - set=0, binding=0
%mat4_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v3float %v3float %v3float
OpDecorate %UBO Block
%UBO_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ubo = OpVariable %UBO_ptr Uniform

; Geometry main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %voidfn
%entry = OpLabel

; Indices and common constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int32 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int32 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int32 2
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_03333334 = OpConstant %float 0.33333334
%float_008 = OpConstant %float 0.08

; Load positions p0, p1, p2 from gl_in[i].gl_Position
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%addr_p0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v4float %addr_p0
%addr_p1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%p1 = OpLoad %v4float %addr_p1
%addr_p2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%p2 = OpLoad %v4float %addr_p2

; Compute face normal (p1 - p0) x (p2 - p0) and normalize
%p0_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %p0 0 1 2
%p1_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %p1 0 1 2
%p2_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %p2 0 1 2
%e1 = OpFSub %v3float %p1_xyz %p0_xyz
%e2 = OpFSub %v3float %p2_xyz %p0_xyz
%cross = OpExtInst %v3float %GLSLstd450 Cross %e1 %e2
%N = OpExtInst %v3float %GLSLstd450 Normalize %cross
%offset3 = OpFMul %v3float %N %float_008
%offset_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %offset3 0
%offset_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %offset3 1
%offset_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %offset3 2
%offset4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %offset_x %offset_y %offset_z %float_0

; Compute new positions: pI + offset4
%newP0 = OpFAdd %v4float %p0 %offset4
%newP1 = OpFAdd %v4float %p1 %offset4
%newP2 = OpFAdd %v4float %p2 %offset4

; Load per-vertex colors for each vertex
%ptr_color_in_vec3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%color0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_color_in_vec3 %color_in %int_0
%color0 = OpLoad %v3float %color0_ptr
%color1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_color_in_vec3 %color_in %int_1
%color1 = OpLoad %v3float %color1_ptr
%color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_color_in_vec3 %color_in %int_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color2_ptr

; Emit vertex 0
%addr_pos_out = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %addr_pos_out %newP0
OpStore %outColor %color0
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 1
OpStore %addr_pos_out %newP1
OpStore %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex

; Emit vertex 2
OpStore %addr_pos_out %newP2
OpStore %outColor %color2
OpEmitVertex

; End primitive
OpEndPrimitive

; End function
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Entry point declaration
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %outColor

View SPIR-V (4176 chars)
; SPIR-V geometry shader implementing centroid shrink of each triangle
; Vulkan 1.0 / GLSL450
; Generated SPIR-V assembly

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_1Third = OpConstant %float 0.33333334
%vec4_0_7 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_7
%vec4_oneThird = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_1Third %float_1Third %float_1Third %float_1Third

; Structures for per-vertex inputs/outputs
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %gl_PerVertex_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; Input arrays (one per-vertex attribute, size = 3 for triangles)
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%arr_v3_in = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_3

%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_in
; worldPos at location 0
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
; normal at location 1 (not used in this shader, but declared per spec)
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
; color at location 2
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2

; Output: per-vertex position
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
; Output (per-vertex color to fragment shader)
%outColor_ptr = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %outColor_ptr Output
OpDecorate %outColor_ptr Location 0

; Execution model declarations
%void = OpTypeVoid
%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%label = OpLabel

; Read positions p0, p1, p2 from gl_in
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr

%p1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%p1 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr

%p2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%p2 = OpLoad %v4float %p2_ptr

; Centroid C = (p0 + p1 + p2) / 3
%sum01 = OpFAdd %v4float %p0 %p1
%sum012 = OpFAdd %v4float %sum01 %p2
%C = OpFMul %v4float %sum012 %vec4_oneThird

; Vertex 0: new0 = C + s*(p0 - C)
%dir0 = OpFSub %v4float %p0 %C
%scaled0 = OpFMul %v4float %dir0 %vec4_0_7
%new0 = OpFAdd %v4float %C %scaled0

; Emit vertex 0
%gl_pos_ptr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr0 %new0

; Load color0 from input color array
%color0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color_in %int_0
%color0 = OpLoad %v3float %color0_ptr
OpStore %outColor %color0
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1: new1 = C + s*(p1 - C)
%dir1 = OpFSub %v4float %p1 %C
%scaled1 = OpFMul %v4float %dir1 %vec4_0_7
%new1 = OpFAdd %v4float %C %scaled1

; Emit vertex 1
%gl_pos_ptr1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr1 %new1

; Load color1
%color1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color_in %int_1
%color1 = OpLoad %v3float %color1_ptr
OpStore %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: new2 = C + s*(p2 - C)
%dir2 = OpFSub %v4float %p2 %C
%scaled2 = OpFMul %v4float %dir2 %vec4_0_7
%new2 = OpFAdd %v4float %C %scaled2

; Emit vertex 2
%gl_pos_ptr2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr2 %new2

; Load color2
%color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color_in %int_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color2_ptr
OpStore %outColor %color2
OpEmitVertex

; End primitive and return
OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Execution modes
OpExecutionMode %main InputTriangles
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Entry point and interface
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %outColor

; Note: The UBO (set=0, binding=0) is accessible from this shader as a uniform block if used;
; this shader does not read from it directly in this minimal example.

Geometry Shader - Smooth Thick Curve (line_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (6984 chars)
; SPIR-V assembly for a geometry shader that renders a thick, smooth curve from 4-vertex adjacency input
; Input primitive: InputLinesAdjacency (4 vertices: prev, start, end, next)
; Output: a 4-vertex triangle strip forming two quads along a thick curved segment
; Capabilities and memory model
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Extended instruction set for sqrt, etc.
%GLSL450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4

; Structures for gl_PerVertex_in (built-in Position)
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

; Input: per-vertex arrays (size 4 for adjacency with 4 vertices)
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_4
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; Inputs: user-defined per-vertex arrays
; worldPos[]; normal[] are present but not used in this shader (kept for completeness)
%arr_vec3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_4
%ptr_in_arr_worldPos = OpTypePointer Input %arr_vec3
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_worldPos Input
%ptr_in_arr_normal = OpTypePointer Input %arr_vec3
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_normal Input
%ptr_in_arr_color = OpTypePointer Input %arr_vec3
%color = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_color Input

; Output: per-vertex position (gl_Position) and per-vertex color for fragment shader
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
; Per-vertex color output
%ptr_out_color = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_color Output

; UBO (set=0, binding=0) - accessible from GS (layout kept simple; content not used in this shader)
%ubo_t = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%ptr_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_t
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo Block
OpMemberDecorate %ubo_t 0 Offset 0

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_025 = OpConstant %float 0.025

; Entry point and interface
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_out %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputLinesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Function: main
%main = OpFunction %void None %3
%entry = OpLabel

; Local declarations (indices, etc.)
; Load vertex positions from gl_in
%pos_prev_ptr  = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%pos_start_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%pos_end_ptr   = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%pos_next_ptr  = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_3 %int_0

%pos_prev = OpLoad %v4float %pos_prev_ptr
%pos_start = OpLoad %v4float %pos_start_ptr
%pos_end = OpLoad %v4float %pos_end_ptr
%pos_next = OpLoad %v4float %pos_next_ptr

; Helper: extract components
%start_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_start 0
%start_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_start 1
%start_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_start 2
%start_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_start 3

%prev_x  = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_prev  0
%prev_y  = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_prev  1

%end_x   = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_end   0
%end_y   = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_end   1
%end_z   = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_end   2
%end_w   = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_end   3

%next_x  = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_next   0
%next_y  = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos_next   1

; Tangent t0 = normalize(end.prev)
%dx0 = OpFSub %float %end_x %prev_x
%dy0 = OpFSub %float %end_y %prev_y
%dx0_sq = OpFMul %float %dx0 %dx0
%dy0_sq = OpFMul %float %dy0 %dy0
%sum0  = OpFAdd %float %dx0_sq %dy0_sq
%len0  = OpExtInst %float %GLSL450 Sqrt %sum0
%inv_len0 = OpFDiv %float %float_1 %len0
%t0x = OpFMul %float %dx0 %inv_len0
%t0y = OpFMul %float %dy0 %inv_len0
%perp0x = OpFNeg %float %t0y
%perp0y = %t0x
%thickness = %float_0_025

; offsets for start side
%offsetX0 = OpFMul %float %perp0x %thickness
%offsetY0 = OpFMul %float %perp0y %thickness

; Start point + thickness offset
%start_plus_x = OpFAdd %float %start_x %%offsetX0
%start_plus_y = OpFAdd %float %start_y %%offsetY0
%start_plus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %start_plus_x %start_plus_y %start_z %start_w

; Start point - thickness offset
%start_minus_x = OpFSub %float %start_x %%offsetX0
%start_minus_y = OpFSub %float %start_y %%offsetY0
%start_minus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %start_minus_x %start_minus_y %start_z %start_w

; Tangent t1 = normalize(next - start)
%dx1 = OpFSub %float %next_x %start_x
%dy1 = OpFSub %float %next_y %start_y
%dx1_sq = OpFMul %float %dx1 %dx1
%dy1_sq = OpFMul %float %dy1 %dy1
%sum1  = OpFAdd %float %dx1_sq %dy1_sq
%len1  = OpExtInst %float %GLSL450 Sqrt %sum1
%inv_len1 = OpFDiv %float %float_1 %len1
%t1x = OpFMul %float %dx1 %inv_len1
%t1y = OpFMul %float %dy1 %inv_len1
%perp1x = OpFNeg %float %t1y
%perp1y = %t1x
%offsetX1 = OpFMul %float %perp1x %thickness
%offsetY1 = OpFMul %float %perp1y %thickness

; End point + thickness offset
%end_plus_x = OpFAdd %float %end_x %%offsetX1
%end_plus_y = OpFAdd %float %end_y %%offsetY1
%end_plus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %end_plus_x %end_plus_y %end_z %end_w

; End point - thickness offset
%end_minus_x = OpFSub %float %end_x %%offsetX1
%end_minus_y = OpFSub %float %end_y %%offsetY1
%end_minus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %end_minus_x %end_minus_y %end_z %end_w

; Load colors
%col1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_vec3 %color %int_1
%col1 = OpLoad %v3float %col1_ptr
%col2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_vec3 %color %int_2
%col2 = OpLoad %v3float %col2_ptr

; Vertex 0: start_plus, color col1
%pos_out_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_out_ptr %start_plus
OpStore %outColor %col1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1: start_minus, color col1
OpStore %pos_out_ptr %start_minus
OpStore %outColor %col1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: end_plus, color col2
OpStore %pos_out_ptr %end_plus
OpStore %outColor %col2
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: end_minus, color col2
OpStore %pos_out_ptr %end_minus
OpStore %outColor %col2
OpEmitVertex

; End the primitive
OpEndPrimitive

; Finish function
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Notes:
; - This shader reads four vertices from gl_in (prev, start, end, next) and renders a thick curve as a 4-vertex triangle strip.
; - The thickness is constant at 0.025 (in clip-space units; adjust as needed).
; - Colors are taken from color[1] (start) and color[2] (end). Both start vertices use color[1]; both end vertices use color[2].
; - A simple UBO placeholder is declared to satisfy "available UBO" requirement; its content is not used in calculations here.
