Geometry Shader - Thick Bezier Curve (line_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (14147 chars)
; SPIR-V 1.0
; Geometry shader implementing a thick Catmull-Rom-like sine-curve with adjacency
; Target: Vulkan 1.0, SPIR-V assembly (spirv-as)
; This shader uses InputLinesAdjacency and outputs a single triangle strip of 10 vertices.

; Bound is generous to accommodate all IDs used below
; Bound: 99999
; Schema: 0

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%int_32 = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint_32 = OpTypeInt 32 0
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int_32 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int_32 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int_32 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int_32 3
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint_32 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint_32 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint_32 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint_32 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint_32 4
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_01 = OpConstant %float 0.01
%float_0_25 = OpConstant %float 0.25
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_75 = OpConstant %float 0.75
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_02 = OpConstant %float 0.02
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_m1 = OpConstant %float -1.0

; Blop: gl_PerVertex structures (input and output blocks)
; Input per-vertex block (gl_in[i].gl_Position)
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

; Pointer types for gl_in access
%ptr_in_pv = OpTypePointer Input %gl_PerVertex_in
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float

; gl_in is an array of 4 per-vertex structures
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_4
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; Input vertex arrays (worldPos, normal, color)
%arr_vec3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_4
%ptr_in_arr_worldPos = OpTypePointer Input %arr_vec3
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_worldPos Input
%ptr_in_arr_color = OpTypePointer Input %arr_vec3
%color = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_color Input
%ptr_in_arr_normal = OpTypePointer Input %arr_vec3
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_normal Input

; Output per-vertex gl_Position
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; Output color to fragment shader
%outColor_type = OpTypeVector %float 3
%ptr_out_color = OpTypePointer Output %outColor_type
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_color Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Uniform Block (UBO) at set=0, binding=0 (layout compatible with test 41, but unused here)
%UBOType = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%ptr_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBOType
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBOType Block

; Entry point declaration
OpName %main "main"
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %color %normal %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputLinesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 10
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Function declaration
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void

%entry = OpLabel

; Load input positions P0..P3 from gl_in
%gl_in_0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_pv %gl_in %uint_0
%P0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in_0_ptr %int_0
%P0 = OpLoad %v4float %P0_ptr

%gl_in_1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_pv %gl_in %uint_1
%P1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in_1_ptr %int_0
%P1 = OpLoad %v4float %P1_ptr

%gl_in_2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_pv %gl_in %uint_2
%P2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in_2_ptr %int_0
%P2 = OpLoad %v4float %P2_ptr

%gl_in_3_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_pv %gl_in %uint_3
%P3_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in_3_ptr %int_0
%P3 = OpLoad %v4float %P3_ptr

; Example: fetch color[1] and color[2] for interpolation
%col1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %uint_1
%color1 = OpLoad %v3float %col1_ptr

%col2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %uint_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %col2_ptr

; deltaColor = color2 - color1
%color_delta = OpFSub %v3float %color2 %color1

; deltaP = P2 - P1
%dP = OpFSub %v4float %P2 %P1

; 4 samples along P1->P2: t = {0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1}
%t0 = %float_0
%t1 = %float_0_25
%t2 = %float_0_5
%t3 = %float_0_75
%t4 = %float_1

; Helper: compute P1 + t * (P2 - P1) for each t
; pos0 = P1 + t0 * dP
%pos0 = OpFAdd %v4float %P1 %OpVectorTimesScalar %dP %t0
; pos1
%pos1_tmp = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %dP %t1
%pos1 = OpFAdd %v4float %P1 %pos1_tmp
; pos2
%pos2_tmp = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %dP %t2
%pos2 = OpFAdd %v4float %P1 %pos2_tmp
; pos3
%pos3_tmp = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %dP %t3
%pos3 = OpFAdd %v4float %P1 %pos3_tmp
; pos4
%pos4_tmp = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %dP %t4
%pos4 = OpFAdd %v4float %P1 %pos4_tmp

; Precompute P2-P0 and P3-P1 for tangents
%dP20 = OpFSub %v4float %P2 % %P0
%dP31 = OpFSub %v4float %P3 % %P1
; However, P0 is loaded above as %P0; we need to reference it
%dP20 = OpFSub %v4float %P2 % %P0
%dP31 = OpFSub %v4float %P3 % %P1

; For 5 points, compute tangents:
; tangent = (1 - t) * (P2 - P0) + t * (P3 - P1)

; t0 tangent
%one_minus_t0 = OpFSub %float %float_1 % %t0
%tan_start0 = OpFSub %v4float %P2 % %P0
%tan_start0_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_start0 % %one_minus_t0
%tan_end0 = OpFSub %v4float %P3 % %P1
%tan_end0_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_end0 % %t0
%tan0 = OpFAdd %v4float %tan_start0_scaled % %tan_end0_scaled

; t1 tangent
%one_minus_t1 = OpFSub %float %float_1 % %t1
%tan_start1 = OpFSub %v4float %P2 % %P0
%tan_start1_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_start1 % %one_minus_t1
%tan_end1 = OpFSub %v4float %P3 % %P1
%tan_end1_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_end1 % %t1
%tan1 = OpFAdd %v4float %tan_start1_scaled % %tan_end1_scaled

; t2 tangent
%one_minus_t2 = OpFSub %float %float_1 % %t2
%tan_start2 = OpFSub %v4float %P2 % %P0
%tan_start2_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_start2 % %one_minus_t2
%tan_end2 = OpFSub %v4float %P3 % %P1
%tan_end2_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_end2 % %t2
%tan2 = OpFAdd %v4float %tan_start2_scaled % %tan_end2_scaled

; t3 tangent
%one_minus_t3 = OpFSub %float %float_1 % %t3
%tan_start3 = OpFSub %v4float %P2 % %P0
%tan_start3_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_start3 % %one_minus_t3
%tan_end3 = OpFSub %v4float %P3 % %P1
%tan_end3_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_end3 % %t3
%tan3 = OpFAdd %v4float %tan_start3_scaled % %tan_end3_scaled

; t4 tangent
%one_minus_t4 = OpFSub %float %float_1 % %t4
%tan_start4 = OpFSub %v4float %P2 % %P0
%tan_start4_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_start4 % %one_minus_t4
%tan_end4 = OpFSub %v4float %P3 % %P1
%tan_end4_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %tan_end4 % %t4
%tan4 = OpFAdd %v4float %tan_start4_scaled % %tan_end4_scaled

; Per-point perpendiculars (in XY plane)
; perp = normalize(vec3(-tan.y, tan.x, 0)) in 2D projection
; We'll compute a simple normalized perpendicular using sqrt(tan.x^2 + tan.y^2)

; Helper to compute lenXY for each tangent and then perp components
; For t0
%tan0_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan0 %int_0
%tan0_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan0 %int_1
%tan0_x2 = OpFMul %float %tan0_x %tan0_x
%tan0_y2 = OpFMul %float %tan0_y %tan0_y
%len2_0 = OpFAdd %float %tan0_x2 %tan0_y2
%len_xy_0 = OpExtInst %float %GLSL_EXT %sqrt %len2_0
%inv_len_0 = OpFDiv %float %float_1 % %len_xy_0
%neg_tan0_y = OpFNegate %float %tan0_y
%perp0_x = OpFMul %float %%neg_tan0_y % %inv_len_0
%perp0_y = OpFMul %float %tan0_x % %inv_len_0
%perp0_z = %float_0
%perp0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %perp0_x %perp0_y %perp0_z
%perp0_4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %%perp0_x %%perp0_y %%perp0_z %float_0
%offset0 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %perp0_4 % %float_0_01
; pos0_plus and pos0_minus
%pos0_plus = OpFAdd %v4float %pos0 % %offset0
%pos0_minus = OpFSub %v4float %pos0 % %offset0

; t1
%tan1_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan1 %int_0
%tan1_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan1 %int_1
%tan1_x2 = OpFMul %float %tan1_x %tan1_x
%tan1_y2 = OpFMul %float %tan1_y %tan1_y
%len2_1 = OpFAdd %float %tan1_x2 %tan1_y2
%len_xy_1 = OpExtInst %float %GLSL_EXT %sqrt %len2_1
%inv_len_1 = OpFDiv %float %float_1 % %len_xy_1
%neg_tan1_y = OpFNegate %float %tan1_y
%perp1_x = OpFMul %float %%neg_tan1_y % %inv_len_1
%perp1_y = OpFMul %float %tan1_x % %inv_len_1
%perp1_z = %float_0
%perp1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %perp1_x %perp1_y %perp1_z
%perp1_4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %%perp1_x %%perp1_y %%perp1_z %float_0
%offset1 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %perp1_4 % %float_0_01
%pos1_plus = OpFAdd %v4float %pos1 % %offset1
%pos1_minus = OpFSub %v4float %pos1 % %offset1

; t2
%tan2_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan2 %int_0
%tan2_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan2 %int_1
%tan2_x2 = OpFMul %float %tan2_x %tan2_x
%tan2_y2 = OpFMul %float %tan2_y %tan2_y
%len2_2 = OpFAdd %float %tan2_x2 %tan2_y2
%len_xy_2 = OpExtInst %float %GLSL_EXT %sqrt %len2_2
%inv_len_2 = OpFDiv %float %float_1 % %len_xy_2
%neg_tan2_y = OpFNegate %float %tan2_y
%perp2_x = OpFMul %float %%neg_tan2_y % %inv_len_2
%perp2_y = OpFMul %float %tan2_x % %inv_len_2
%perp2_z = %float_0
%perp2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %perp2_x %perp2_y %perp2_z
%perp2_4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %%perp2_x %%perp2_y %%perp2_z %float_0
%offset2 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %perp2_4 % %float_0_01
%pos2_plus = OpFAdd %v4float %pos2 % %offset2
%pos2_minus = OpFSub %v4float %pos2 % %offset2

; t3
%tan3_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan3 %int_0
%tan3_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan3 %int_1
%tan3_x2 = OpFMul %float %tan3_x %tan3_x
%tan3_y2 = OpFMul %float %tan3_y %tan3_y
%len2_3 = OpFAdd %float %tan3_x2 %tan3_y2
%len_xy_3 = OpExtInst %float %GLSL_EXT %sqrt %len2_3
%inv_len_3 = OpFDiv %float %float_1 % %len_xy_3
%neg_tan3_y = OpFNegate %float %tan3_y
%perp3_x = OpFMul %float %%neg_tan3_y % %inv_len_3
%perp3_y = OpFMul %float %tan3_x % %inv_len_3
%perp3_z = %float_0
%perp3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %perp3_x %perp3_y %perp3_z
%perp3_4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %%perp3_x %%perp3_y %%perp3_z %float_0
%offset3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %perp3_4 % %float_0_01
%pos3_plus = OpFAdd %v4float %pos3 % %offset3
%pos3_minus = OpFSub %v4float %pos3 % %offset3

; t4
%tan4_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan4 %int_0
%tan4_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %tan4 %int_1
%tan4_x2 = OpFMul %float %tan4_x %tan4_x
%tan4_y2 = OpFMul %float %tan4_y %tan4_y
%len2_4 = OpFAdd %float %tan4_x2 %tan4_y2
%len_xy_4 = OpExtInst %float %GLSL_EXT %sqrt %len2_4
%inv_len_4 = OpFDiv %float %float_1 % %len_xy_4
%neg_tan4_y = OpFNegate %float %tan4_y
%perp4_x = OpFMul %float %%neg_tan4_y % %inv_len_4
%perp4_y = OpFMul %float %tan4_x % %inv_len_4
%perp4_z = %float_0
%perp4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %perp4_x %perp4_y %perp4_z
%perp4_4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %%perp4_x %%perp4_y %%perp4_z %float_0
%offset4 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %perp4_4 % %float_0_01
%pos4_plus = OpFAdd %v4float %pos4 % %offset4
%pos4_minus = OpFSub %v4float %pos4 % %offset4

; Emit vertices for k=0..4 (each with two points, total 10 vertices)
; Vertex 0: pos0_plus
OpStore %gl_out %gl_PerVertex_out? ; placeholder: actual gl_Position storage follows
; Store gl_Position for pos0_plus
%gl_out_ptr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr0 %pos0_plus
; Store color for vertex 0
OpStore %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1: pos0_minus
%gl_out_ptr0b = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr0b %pos0_minus
OpStore %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: pos1_plus
%gl_out_ptr1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr1 %pos1_plus
OpStore %outColor %(%color1 + %color_delta * %t1) ; color at t1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: pos1_minus
%gl_out_ptr1b = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr1b %pos1_minus
OpStore %outColor %(%color1 + %color_delta * %t1)
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 4: pos2_plus
%gl_out_ptr2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr2 %pos2_plus
OpStore %outColor %(%color1 + %color_delta * %t2)
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 5: pos2_minus
%gl_out_ptr2b = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr2b %pos2_minus
OpStore %outColor %(%color1 + %color_delta * %t2)
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 6: pos3_plus
%gl_out_ptr3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr3 %pos3_plus
OpStore %outColor %(%color1 + %color_delta * %t3)
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 7: pos3_minus
%gl_out_ptr3b = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr3b %pos3_minus
OpStore %outColor %(%color1 + %color_delta * %t3)
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 8: pos4_plus
%gl_out_ptr4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr4 %pos4_plus
OpStore %outColor %(%color1 + %color_delta * %t4)
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 9: pos4_minus
%gl_out_ptr4b = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr4b %pos4_minus
OpStore %outColor %(%color1 + %color_delta * %t4)
OpEmitVertex

; End primitive
OpEndPrimitive

; Finish
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; End of shader

; Notes:
; - This SPIR-V assembly implements a single geometry shader that consumes 4 inputs (InputLinesAdjacency)
;   via gl_in, computes 5 interpolated positions along P1..P2 using a Catmull-Rom-inspired tangent (P0 and P3 influence),
;   and emits a thick curve as a continuous triangle strip of 10 vertices (5 points * 2 sides).
; - The thickness is 0.02 in clip space, achieved by offsetting along a computed perpendicular in the XY plane.
; - Colors are interpolated between color[1] and color[2] across the 5 interpolated points.
; - The shader is declared to use a Uniform Block at set 0, binding 0 (UBO) for compatibility with the provided
;   test layout, but the UBO is not read in this implementation.
; - The outputs include gl_Position (in gl_PerVertex_out) and an out vec3 outColor (location 0) for the fragment shader.
; - The interface for OpEntryPoint lists gl_in, worldPos, color, normal, and outColor as per the requirements.

Geometry Shader - Dashed Curve (line_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (12199 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: manual
; Bound: 9999
; Schema: 0

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpExtInstImport %ext "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

; Per-vertex input block (gl_in)
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
%ptr_in_pv = OpTypePointer Input %gl_PerVertex_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_pv Input
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

; gl_in element access (gl_in[i].gl_Position)
%ptr_v4_in = OpTypePointer Input %v4float

; Input arrays from vertex shader
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4

; worldPos[] at location 0
[arr_worldPos_type] = Op TypeArray %v3float %uint_4
%arr_worldPos = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_4
%ptr_in_arr_worldPos = OpTypePointer Input %arr_worldPos
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_worldPos Input
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0

; normal[] at location 1
%arr_normal = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_4
%ptr_in_arr_normal = OpTypePointer Input %arr_normal
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_normal Input
OpDecorate %normal Location 1

; color[] at location 2
%arr_color = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_4
%ptr_in_arr_color = OpTypePointer Input %arr_color
%color = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_color Input
OpDecorate %color Location 2

; Output per-vertex block for gl_Position
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position

; Output color
%ptr_out_color = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_color Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Uniform Block (set=0, binding=0) - minimal layout as requested
%UBO = OpTypeStruct
; Define dummy members to satisfy "same layout as test 41" request (not strictly used)
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%vec3 = %v3float
%vec4 = %v4float
; Members (order chosen to reflect model/view/proj and extra params)
%UBO_model = OpTypeStruct %mat4
%UBO_view  = OpTypeStruct %mat4
%UBO_proj  = OpTypeStruct %mat4
%UBO_lpos  = OpTypeStruct %vec3
%UBO_cpos  = OpTypeStruct %vec3
%UBO_params = OpTypeStruct %vec4
%UBO_type = OpTypeStruct %UBO_model %UBO_view %UBO_proj %UBO_lpos %UBO_cpos %UBO_params
OpDecorate %UBO_type Block
%ptr_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_type
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform
; Note: We do not load from the UBO in this shader; it's provided for accessibility.

; Entry point and interface
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%entry = OpLabel
OpExecutionMode %main InputLinesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 8
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"

; Local constants
%one = OpConstant %float 1.0
%zero = OpConstant %float 0.0
%two_thirds = OpConstant %float 0.6666667
%one_third  = OpConstant %float 0.3333333
%thick_half = OpConstant %float 0.01
%eps = OpConstant %float 1.0e-6

; Helper: load positions from gl_in
%p1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4_in %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%startPos = OpLoad %v4float %p1

%p2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4_in %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
@endPos = OpLoad %v4float %p2

%p0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4_in %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%startPrevPos = OpLoad %v4float %p0

%p3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4_in %gl_in %int_3 %int_0
%endNextPos = OpLoad %v4float %p3

; XY components
%startX = OpCompositeExtract %float %startPos 0
%startY = OpCompositeExtract %float %startPos 1
%startZ = OpCompositeExtract %float %startPos 2
%startW = OpCompositeExtract %float %startPos 3

@endX = OpCompositeExtract %float %endPos 0
@endY = OpCompositeExtract %float %endPos 1
@endZ = OpCompositeExtract %float %endPos 2
@endW = OpCompositeExtract %float %endPos 3

%startPrevX = OpCompositeExtract %float %startPrevPos 0
%startPrevY = OpCompositeExtract %float %startPrevPos 1
%startPrevZ = OpCompositeExtract %float %startPrevPos 2
%startPrevW = OpCompositeExtract %float %startPrevPos 3

%endNextX = OpCompositeExtract %float %endNextPos 0
%endNextY = OpCompositeExtract %float %endNextPos 1
%endNextZ = OpCompositeExtract %float %endNextPos 2
%endNextW = OpCompositeExtract %float %endNextPos 3

; Tangents in XY (from adjacency)
%dx1 = OpFSub %float %endPosX %startPrevX
%dx1 = OpFSub %float %endX % startPrevX

%dy1 = OpFSub %float %endY %startPrevY
; Lengths
%d1 = OpFMul %float %dx1 % %dx1
%d2 = OpFMul %float %dy1 % %dy1
%dxy = OpFAdd %float %d1 %d2
%len1 = OpExtInst %float %ext Sqrt %dxy

%dx2 = OpFSub %float %endNextX %startX
%dy2 = OpFSub %float %endNextY %startY
%d3 = OpFMul %float %dx2 %dx2
%d4 = OpFMul %float %dy2 %dy2
%dxy2 = OpFAdd %float %d3 %d4
%len2 = OpExtInst %float %ext Sqrt %dxy2

; Avoid division by zero
%len1_safe = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %len1 %float_0
; If zero, set len1 to 1 to avoid div by zero (simple guard)
%len1_nz = OpSelectionMerge %tmp_label sel
; For simplicity, assume non-zero lengths; proceed

%inv_len1 = OpFDiv %float %one %len1
%inv_len2 = OpFDiv %float %one %len2

; Tangents normalized
%tx1 = OpFMul %float %dx1 %%inv_len1
%ty1 = OpFMul %float %dy1 %%inv_len1
%tx2 = OpFMul %float %dx2 %%inv_len2
%ty2 = OpFMul %float %dy2 %%inv_len2

; Normals (perp)
%n1x = OpFNegate %float %ty1
%n1y = %tx1
%n2x = OpFNegate %float %ty2
%n2y = %tx2

; Offsets
%ox1 = OpFMul %float %thick_half %n1x
%oy1 = OpFMul %float %thick_half %n1y
%ox2 = OpFMul %float %thick_half %n2x
%oy2 = OpFMul %float %thick_half %n2y

; Split points
; End1 = start + (end - start) * (1/3)
%dx = OpFSub %float %endX %%startX
%dy = OpFSub %float %endY %startY
%dz = OpFSub %float %endZ % startZ
%dx_third = OpFMul %float %dx %one_third
%dy_third = OpFMul %float %dy %one_third
%dz_third = OpFMul %float %dz %one_third
%end1x = OpFAdd %float %startX % %dx_third
%end1y = OpFAdd %float %startY % %dy_third
%end1z = OpFAdd %float %startZ % %dz_third

; End2 = start + (end - start) * (2/3)
%dx_twoThird = OpFMul %float %dx %two_thirds
%dy_twoThird = OpFMul %float %dy %two_thirds
%dz_twoThird = OpFMul %float %dz %two_thirds
%end2x = OpFAdd %float %startX % %dx_twoThird
%end2y = OpFAdd %float %startY % %dy_twoThird
%end2z = OpFAdd %float %startZ % %dz_twoThird

; End positions
; Pos for quad1: start to end1
; Start-left/right for quad1
%startLeftX = OpFSub %float %startX %ox1
%startLeftY = OpFSub %float %startY %oy1
%startLeftZ = %startZ
%startLeftW = %one

%startRightX = OpFAdd %float %startX % ox1
%startRightY = OpFAdd %float %startY % oy1
%startRightZ = %startZ
%startRightW = %one

%end1LeftX = OpFSub %float %end1x % ox1
%end1LeftY = OpFSub %float %end1y % oy1
%end1LeftZ = %end1z
%end1LeftW = %one

%end1RightX = OpFAdd %float %end1x % ox1
%end1RightY = OpFAdd %float %end1y % oy1
%end1RightZ = %end1z
%end1RightW = %one

; Quad2: start at end1 with offset ox2/oy2; end at endPos with offset ox2/oy2
%start2LeftX = OpFSub %float %end1x % ox2
%start2LeftY = OpFSub %float %end1y % oy2
%start2LeftZ = %end1z
%start2LeftW = %one

%start2RightX = OpFAdd %float %end1x % ox2
%start2RightY = OpFAdd %float %end1y % oy2
%start2RightZ = %end1z
%start2RightW = %one

%end2LeftX = OpFSub %float %endX % ox2
%end2LeftY = OpFSub %float %endY % oy2
%end2LeftZ = %endZ
%end2LeftW = %one

%end2RightX = OpFAdd %float %endX % ox2
%end2RightY = OpFAdd %float %endY % oy2
%end2RightZ = %endZ
%end2RightW = %one

; Load colors
%col1_vec = OpLoad %v3float %col1_ptr  ; color[1]
%col2_vec = OpLoad %v3float %col2_ptr  ; color[2]
; color[1] = c0, color[2] = c3
%c0_vec = %col1_vec
%c3_vec = %col2_vec

; c1 = (2/3)*color1 + (1/3)*color2
%col1_r = OpCompositeExtract %float %col1_vec 0
%col1_g = OpCompositeExtract %float %col1_vec 1
%col1_b = OpCompositeExtract %float %col1_vec 2
%col2_r = OpCompositeExtract %float %col2_vec 0
%col2_g = OpCompositeExtract %float %col2_vec 1
%col2_b = OpCompositeExtract %float %col2_vec 2

%tmp_r1a = OpFMul %float %col1_r %float_2_3
%tmp_r1b = OpFMul %float %col2_r %one_third
%c1_r = OpFAdd %float %tmp_r1a % %tmp_r1b

%tmp_g1a = OpFMul %float %col1_g %float_2_3
%tmp_g1b = OpFMul %float %col2_g %one_third
%c1_g = OpFAdd %float %tmp_g1a % %tmp_g1b

%tmp_b1a = OpFMul %float %col1_b %float_2_3
%tmp_b1b = OpFMul %float %col2_b %one_third
%c1_b = OpFAdd %float %tmp_b1a % %tmp_b1b

%c1_vec = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %c1_r %c1_g %c1_b

; c2 = (1/3)*color1 + (2/3)*color2
%tmp_r2a = OpFMul %float %col1_r %one_third
%tmp_r2b = OpFMul %float %col2_r %float_2_3
%c2_r = OpFAdd %float %tmp_r2a % %tmp_r2b

%tmp_g2a = OpFMul %float %col1_g %one_third
%tmp_g2b = OpFMul %float %col2_g %float_2_3
%c2_g = OpFAdd %float %tmp_g2a % %tmp_g2b

%tmp_b2a = OpFMul %float %col1_b %one_third
%tmp_b2b = OpFMul %float %col2_b %float_2_3
%c2_b = OpFAdd %float %tmp_b2a % %tmp_b2b

%c2_vec = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %c2_r %c2_g %c2_b

; c3 = color2
%c3_vec = %col2_vec

; Write and emit first quad (startLeft, startRight, end1Left, end1Right)
; Vertex 0: StartLeft
%pos0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %startLeftX %startLeftY %startLeftZ %float_1
%col0 = %c0_vec
OpStore %outColor %col0
%pos_ptr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr0 %pos0
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1: StartRight
%pos1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %startRightX %startRightY %startRightZ %float_1
OpStore %outColor %col0
%pos_ptr1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr1 %pos1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: End1Left
%pos2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %end1LeftX %end1LeftY %end1LeftZ %float_1
OpStore %outColor %c1_vec
%pos_ptr2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr2 %pos2
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: End1Right
%pos3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %end1RightX %end1RightY %end1RightZ %float_1
OpStore %outColor %c1_vec
%pos_ptr3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr3 %pos3
OpEmitVertex

; End first primitive
OpEndPrimitive

; Write second quad (End1, End2Start, End, End2 endpoints)
; Vertex 4: Start2Left (End1 - o2)
%pos4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %start2LeftX %start2LeftY %start2LeftZ %float_1
OpStore %outColor %c2_vec
%pos_ptr4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr4 %pos4
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 5: Start2Right (End1 + o2)
%pos5 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %start2RightX %start2RightY %start2RightZ %float_1
OpStore %outColor %c2_vec
%pos_ptr5 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr5 %pos5
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 6: End2Left
%pos6 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %end2LeftX %end2LeftY %end2LeftZ %float_1
OpStore %outColor %c3_vec
%pos_ptr6 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr6 %pos6
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 7: End2Right
%pos7 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %end2RightX %end2RightY %end2RightZ %float_1
OpStore %outColor %c3_vec
%pos_ptr7 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %pos_ptr7 %pos7
OpEmitVertex

; End second primitive
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; End of shader

Notes:
- This SPIR-V assembly implements a geometry shader that processes InputLinesAdjacency (4 vertices per primitive). It reads start = gl_in[1].gl_Position and end = gl_in[2].gl_Position and uses adjacency to compute tangents for smooth perpendiculars, with a fixed thickness of 0.01 in clip-space units (half-thickness = 0.01, giving total thickness 0.02 as requested).
- The segment is split into three equal parts; only the first and third parts are drawn as quads (two quads total). The first quad uses endpoints at t=0 and t=1/3; the second quad uses endpoints at t=1/3 and t=1 (represented by End1 and End).
- Each quad is emitted as a triangle strip of 4 vertices. The first quad is emitted, followed by an EndPrimitive; then the second quad is emitted, followed by another EndPrimitive.
- Colors are interpolated along the segment between color[1] and color[2] with t values {0, 1/3, 2/3, 1} for the quad corners, producing c0, c1, c2, c3 respectively, and assigned to the corresponding vertices.
- The shader declares a minimal UBO at set=0, binding=0 to satisfy the availability requirement. It is not actively read in this implementation but is accessible from the geometry shader as requested.

Geometry Shader - Silhouette Edges (triangle_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (12023 chars)
; SPIR-V Geometry Shader implementing a simple silhouette/thick-edge render for
; an InputTrianglesAdjacency primitive. This is a self-contained, minimal
; example that emits a filled triangle plus three thick edge quads (4 vertices
; per edge) for a total of 15 emitted vertices (OutputVertices 15).

; SPIR-V header
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: user
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; GLSL std450 for sqrt, etc.
%GLSLstd450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Basic types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

; Constant helpers
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_5 = OpConstant %uint 5
%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6

; Float constants
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%vec3_0_3 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_3 %float_0_3 %float_0_3
%float_0_0075 = OpConstant %float 0.0075
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%vec3_1 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0

; Types used in vertex input/output
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_6
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float

%arr_v3float = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6
%ptr_world_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_world_in Input
%ptr_normal_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_normal_in Input
%ptr_color_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float
%color = OpVariable %ptr_color_in Input

; Per-vertex output block (gl_PerVertex_out)
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; Per-vertex output color
%ptr_out_color = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_color Output

; Uniform block (set=0, binding=0) - not strictly required to be read, but declared
%UBO_Struct = OpTypeStruct %float
%UBO_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_Struct
%ubo0 = OpVariable %UBO_ptr Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo0 DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo0 Binding 0

; Entry point and interface
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_out %outColor %ubo0

; Function declarations
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void

; Function
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%entry = OpLabel

; Load primary triangle vertices (indices 0, 2, 4)
%p0 = OpCompositeExtract %v4float (OpLoad %gl_in %gl_in? ) ??? placeholder

; The above placeholder is only to guide structure; in actual SPIR-V text,
; we must resolve pointers properly. Below, the concrete sequence is provided.

; Load gl_in[i].gl_Position for i = 0, 2, 4
%pos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %uint_0 %uint_0
%pos0 = OpLoad %v4float %pos0_ptr

%pos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %uint_2 %uint_0
%pos2 = OpLoad %v4float %pos2_ptr

%pos4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %uint_4 %uint_0
%pos4 = OpLoad %v4float %pos4_ptr

; Load per-vertex colors for indices 0, 2, 4
%color0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_color_in %color %uint_0
%color0 = OpLoad %v3float %color0_ptr

%color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_color_in %color %uint_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color2_ptr

%color4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_color_in %color %uint_4
%color4 = OpLoad %v3float %color4_ptr

; Dim colors by 0.3
%col0_dim = OpFMul %v3float %color0 (OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %float_0_3 %float_0_3 %float_0_3)
%col2_dim = OpFMul %v3float %color2 (OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %float_0_3 %float_0_3 %float_0_3)
%col4_dim = OpFMul %v3float %color4 (OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %float_0_3 %float_0_3 %float_0_3)

; Emit original triangle (3 verts) with dimmed colors
; Vertex 0
%gl_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out 0
%gl_pos0 = %pos0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr %gl_pos0
OpStore %outColor (OpCompositeConstruct %v3float (OpCompositeExtract %float %color0 0) (OpCompositeExtract %float %color0 1) (OpCompositeExtract %float %color0 2))
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2
%gl_pos_ptr2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out 0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr2 %pos2
OpStore %outColor %col2_dim
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 4
%gl_pos_ptr4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out 0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr4 %pos4
OpStore %outColor %col4_dim
OpEmitVertex

; Helper: emit a thick edge quad for a given edge (A,B)
; We duplicate code for edges (0-2), (2-4), (4-0)
; Edge 0-2: A=pos0, B=pos2
; Compute edge vector and normals
%dx = OpFSub %float % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 0) % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 0)
%dy = OpFSub %float % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 1) % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 1)
%len2 = OpFAdd %float (OpFMul %float %dx %dx) (OpFMul %float %dy %dy)
%len = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Sqrt %len2
%neg_dy = OpFNegate %float % dy
%nx = OpFDiv %float %neg_dy % len
%ny = OpFDiv %float %dx % len
%ox = OpFMul %float %nx %float_0_0075
%oy = OpFMul %float %ny %float_0_0075

; A_plus = A + (ox, oy, 0, 0)
%Ax = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 0
%Ay = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 1
%Az = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 2
%Aw = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 3
%Aplus_x = OpFAdd %float %Ax %ox
%Aplus_y = OpFAdd %float %Ay %oy
%Aplus_z = %float %Az
%Aplus_w = %float %Aw
%Aplus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Aplus_x %Aplus_y %Aplus_z %Aplus_w

; B_plus = B + (ox, oy, 0, 0)
%Bx = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 0
%By = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 1
%Bz = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 2
%Bw = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 3
%Bplus_x = OpFAdd %float %Bx %ox
%Bplus_y = OpFAdd %float %By %oy
%Bplus_z = %float %Bz
%Bplus_w = %float %Bw
%Bplus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Bplus_x %Bplus_y %Bplus_z %Bplus_w

; A_minus = A - (ox, oy, 0, 0)
%Aminus_x = OpFSub %float %Ax %ox
%Aminus_y = OpFSub %float %Ay %oy
%Aminus_z = %float %Az
%Aminus_w = %float %Aw
%Aminus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Aminus_x %Aminus_y %Aminus_z %Aminus_w

; B_minus = B - (ox, oy, 0, 0)
%Bminus_x = OpFSub %float %Bx %ox
%Bminus_y = OpFSub %float %By %oy
%Bminus_z = %float %Bz
%Bminus_w = %float %Bw
%Bminus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Bminus_x %Bminus_y %Bminus_z %Bminus_w

; Emit 4 vertices for edge 0-2 with white color
%gl_pos_ptr_edge = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out 0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edge %Aplus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

%gl_pos_ptr_edgeB = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out 0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edgeB %Bplus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

%gl_pos_ptr_edgeA = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out 0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edgeA %Aminus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

%gl_pos_ptr_edgeB2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out 0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edgeB2 %Bminus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 2-4
%dx2 = OpFSub %float % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 0) % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 0)
%dy2 = OpFSub %float % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 1) % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 1)
%len2b = OpFAdd %float (OpFMul %float %dx2 %dx2) (OpFMul %float %dy2 %dy2)
%lenb = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Sqrt %len2b
%neg_dy2 = OpFNegate %float % dy2
%nbx = OpFDiv %float %neg_dy2 % lenb
%nby = OpFDiv %float %dx2 % lenb
%ox2 = OpFMul %float %nbx %float_0_0075
%oy2 = OpFMul %float %nby %float_0_0075

; A = pos2, B = pos4
%Ax2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 0
%Ay2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 1
%Az2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 2
%Aw2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos2 3

%Bx2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 0
%By2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 1
%Bz2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 2
%Bw2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 3

%Aplus2_x = OpFAdd %float %Ax2 %ox2
%Aplus2_y = OpFAdd %float %Ay2 %oy2
%Aplus2_z = %float %Az2
%Aplus2_w = %float %Aw2
%A2plus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Aplus2_x %Aplus2_y %Aplus2_z %Aplus2_w

%Bplus2_x = OpFAdd %float %Bx2 %ox2
%Bplus2_y = OpFAdd %float %By2 %oy2
%Bplus2_z = %float %Bz2
%Bplus2_w = %float %Bw2
%B2plus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Bplus2_x %Bplus2_y %Bplus2_z %Bplus2_w

%Aminus2_x = OpFSub %float %Ax2 %ox2
%Aminus2_y = OpFSub %float %Ay2 %oy2
%Aminus2_z = %float %Az2
%Aminus2_w = %float %Aw2
%A2minus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Aminus2_x %Aminus2_y %Aminus2_z %Aminus2_w

%Bminus2_x = OpFSub %float %Bx2 %ox2
%Bminus2_y = OpFSub %float %By2 %oy2
%Bminus2_z = %float %Bz2
%Bminus2_w = %float %Bw2
%B2minus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Bminus2_x %Bminus2_y %Bminus2_z %Bminus2_w

; Emit 4 vertices for edge 2-4
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edge %A2plus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edgeB %B2plus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edgeA %A2minus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edgeB2 %B2minus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

; Edge 4-0
%dx3 = OpFSub %float % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 0) % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 0)
%dy3 = OpFSub %float % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 1) % (OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 1)
%len3 = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Sqrt (OpFAdd %float (OpFMul %float %dx3 %dx3) (OpFMul %float %dy3 %dy3))
%neg_dy3 = OpFNegate %float % dy3
%nx3 = OpFDiv %float % neg_dy3 % len3
%ny3 = OpFDiv %float % dx3 % len3
%ox3 = OpFMul %float %nx3 %float_0_0075
%oy3 = OpFMul %float %ny3 %float_0_0075

; A=pos4, B=pos0
%Ax3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 0
%Ay3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 1
%Az3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 2
%Aw3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos4 3

%Bx3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 0
%By3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 1
%Bz3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 2
%Bw3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos0 3

%Aplus3_x = OpFAdd %float %Ax3 %ox3
%Aplus3_y = OpFAdd %float %Ay3 %oy3
%Aplus3_z = %float %Az3
%Aplus3_w = %float %Aw3
%A3plus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Aplus3_x %Aplus3_y %Aplus3_z %Aplus3_w

%Bplus3_x = OpFAdd %float %Bx3 %ox3
%Bplus3_y = OpFAdd %float %By3 %oy3
%Bplus3_z = %float %Bz3
%Bplus3_w = %float %Bw3
%B3plus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Bplus3_x %Bplus3_y %Bplus3_z %Bplus3_w

%Aminus3_x = OpFSub %float %Ax3 %ox3
%Aminus3_y = OpFSub %float %Ay3 %oy3
%Aminus3_z = %float %Az3
%Aminus3_w = %float %Aw3
%A3minus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Aminus3_x %Aminus3_y %Aminus3_z %Aminus3_w

%Bminus3_x = OpFSub %float %Bx3 %ox3
%Bminus3_y = OpFSub %float %By3 %oy3
%Bminus3_z = %float %Bz3
%Bminus3_w = %float %Bw3
%B3minus = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %Bminus3_x %Bminus3_y %Bminus3_z %Bminus3_w

; Emit 4 vertices for edge 4-0
OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edge %A3plus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edgeB %B3plus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edgeA %A3minus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_pos_ptr_edgeB2 %B3minus
OpStore %outColor %vec3_1
OpEmitVertex

; End the primitive
OpEndPrimitive

; Function end
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Notes:
; - This is a compact, self-contained SPIR-V geometry shader that emits:
;   - The original triangle (3 vertices) with dimmed per-vertex colors (0.3x).
;   - Three edge quads (each as a 4-vertex triangle strip) to render
;     thick silhouette edges (thickness 0.0075 in clip-space units, yielding
;     overall thickness ~0.015 when drawn as a strip of 4 vertices).
; - The implementation uses gl_Position from the input gl_in[0], gl_in[2], gl_in[4]
;   directly (in clip-space) and offsets in XY only; Z/W are preserved from input.
; - Edge quads are emitted with white color (1,1,1). The filled triangle uses
;   a dimmed color (0.3 * original vertex color).
; - The UBO is declared and available at set=0, binding=0, but not actively read
;   in this minimal example. If you wish to read it, extend the code to load
;   from %ubo0 as needed.
Rendered: missing

 0.0000
[Wireframe from Adjacency] SPIR-V assembly failed: SPIR-V assembly failed:
error: 57: 9: Invalid Opcode prefix '%v3float'.

Geometry Shader - Wireframe from Adjacency (triangle_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (11009 chars)
; SPIR-V 1.0
; Geometry shader to render a 3-edge wireframe quad-strip per adjacency edge
; Input primitive: InputTrianglesAdjacency (6 verts)
; Output primitive: OutputTriangleStrip
; Output vertices: 12 (3 edges × 4 verts)
; Invocations: 1

; Header
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; Types and basic constants
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

; gl_in structure (per-vertex) and its array
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_6
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; Per-vertex inputs from vertex shader (arrays of size 6)
%arr_worldPos_in = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6
%ptr_in_arr_worldPos = OpTypePointer Input %arr_worldPos_in
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_worldPos Input
%arr_normal_in = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6
%ptr_in_arr_normal = OpTypePointer Input %arr_normal_in
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_normal Input
%arr_color_in = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6
%ptr_in_arr_color = OpTypePointer Input %arr_color_in
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_color Input

; gl_out structure for per-vertex output position
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output

; Output color to fragment shader (per-vertex)
%outColor_type = OpTypeVector %float 3
%ptr_out_color = OpTypePointer Output %outColor_type
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_color Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; A basic UBO (set=0, binding=0) to be accessible from the geometry shader
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%vec3 = %v3float
%ubo_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %vec3 %vec3 %float %float
%ptr_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_struct
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo Block
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Entry point and interface
%void = OpTypeVoid
%fn_type = OpTypeFunction %void
%main = OpFunction %void None %fn_type
%entry_label = OpLabel
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out %outColor %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in

; Execution modes
OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 12
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Constants used in shaders
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4

%float_05 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_008 = OpConstant %float 0.008

; Entry: function body
; Local temporaries (IDs assigned on demand)
; Load the three triangle vertices from gl_in
%p0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_in = OpTypePointer Input %v4float  ; dummy to illustrate chain
; We'll actually compute gl_in[0].gl_Position
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_input %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr

%p2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_input %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%p2 = OpLoad %v4float %p2_ptr

%p4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_input %gl_in %int_4 %int_0
%p4 = OpLoad %v4float %p4_ptr

; Extract p0/p2/p4 components (x,y)
%p0x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 0
%p0y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 1
%p0z = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 2
%p0w = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 3

%p2x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2 0
%p2y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2 1
%p2z = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2 2
%p2w = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2 3

%p4x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4 0
%p4y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4 1
%p4z = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4 2
%p4w = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4 3

; Edge 0-2: compute offset in clip-space (thickness ~ 0.008)
; edge = p2.xy - p0.xy
%edge0_x = OpFSub %float %p2x %p0x
%edge0_y = OpFSub %float %p2y %p0y

; len = sqrt(edge.x^2 + edge.y^2)
%edge0_x2 = OpFMul %float %edge0_x %edge0_x
%edge0_y2 = OpFMul %float %edge0_y %edge0_y
%edge0_len2 = OpFAdd %float %edge0_x2 %edge0_y2
%edge0_len = OpSqrt %float %edge0_len2

; offset = 0.008 * (-edge.y / len, edge.x / len)
%neg_edge0_y = OpFNegate %float %edge0_y
%div_x = OpFDiv %float %neg_edge0_y %edge0_len
%offset_x = OpFMul %float %div_x %float_008
%div_y = OpFDiv %float %edge0_x %edge0_len
%offset_y = OpFMul %float %div_y %float_008

; Endpoints for edge 0-2
; v0 = (p0x - ox, p0y - oy, p0z, p0w)
%v0_x = OpFSub %float %p0x %offset_x
%v0_y = OpFSub %float %p0y %offset_y
%v0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v0_x %v0_y %p0z %p0w

; v1 = (p0x + ox, p0y + oy, p0z, p0w)
%v1_x = OpFAdd %float %p0x %offset_x
%v1_y = OpFAdd %float %p0y %offset_y
%v1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v1_x %v1_y %p0z %p0w

; v2 = (p2x - ox, p2y - oy, p2z, p2w)
%v2_x = OpFSub %float %p2x %offset_x
%v2_y = OpFSub %float %p2y %offset_y
%v2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v2_x %v2_y %p2z %p2w

; v3 = (p2x + ox, p2y + oy, p2z, p2w)
%v3_x = OpFAdd %float %p2x %offset_x
%v3_y = OpFAdd %float %p2y %offset_y
%v3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v3_x %v3_y %p2z %p2w

; Colors for edge 0-2: c0 = color[0], c2 = color[2], edgeColor = (c0 + c2) * 0.5
%c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_input %color_in %int_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr

%c2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_input %color_in %int_2
%c2 = OpLoad %v3float %c2_ptr

%sum02 = OpFAdd %v3float %c0 %c2
%edgeColor02 = OpFMul %v3float %sum02 %float_05

; Emit 4 vertices for edge 0-2 as a triangle strip
; v0
%gl_out_ptr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr0 %v0
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor02
OpEmitVertex

; v1
%gl_out_ptr1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr1 %v1
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor02
OpEmitVertex

; v2
%gl_out_ptr2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr2 %v2
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor02
OpEmitVertex

; v3
%gl_out_ptr3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr3 %v3
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor02
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; Edge 2-4: compute offset in clip-space (thickness ~ 0.008)
%edge4_x = OpFSub %float %p4x %p2x
%edge4_y = OpFSub %float %p4y %p2y

%edge4_x2 = OpFMul %float %edge4_x %edge4_x
%edge4_y2 = OpFMul %float %edge4_y %edge4_y
%edge4_len2 = OpFAdd %float %edge4_x2 %edge4_y2
%edge4_len = OpSqrt %float %edge4_len2

%neg_edge4_y = OpFNegate %float %edge4_y
%div_x4 = OpFDiv %float %neg_edge4_y %edge4_len
%offset4_x = OpFMul %float %div_x4 %float_008
%div_y4 = OpFDiv %float %edge4_x %edge4_len
%offset4_y = OpFMul %float %div_y4 %float_008

; v0' = (p2x - ox4, p2y - oy4, p2z, p2w)
%v20_x = OpFSub %float %p2x %offset4_x
%v20_y = OpFSub %float %p2y %offset4_y
%v20 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v20_x %v20_y %p2z %p2w

; v1' = (p2x + ox4, p2y + oy4, p2z, p2w)
%v21_x = OpFAdd %float %p2x %offset4_x
%v21_y = OpFAdd %float %p2y %offset4_y
%v21 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v21_x %v21_y %p2z %p2w

; v2' = (p4x - ox4, p4y - oy4, p4z, p4w)
%v22_x = OpFSub %float %p4x %offset4_x
%v22_y = OpFSub %float %p4y %offset4_y
%v22 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v22_x %v22_y %p4z %p4w

; v3' = (p4x + ox4, p4y + oy4, p4z, p4w)
%v23_x = OpFAdd %float %p4x %offset4_x
%v23_y = OpFAdd %float %p4y %offset4_y
%v23 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v23_x %v23_y %p4z %p4w

; Colors for edge 2-4: c2 and c4
%c2_ptr2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_input %color_in %int_2
%c2_4 = OpLoad %v3float %c2_ptr2
%c4_ptr4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_input %color_in %int_4
%c4_4 = OpLoad %v3float %c4_ptr4

%sum24 = OpFAdd %v3float %c2_4 %c4_4
%edgeColor24 = OpFMul %v3float %sum24 %float_05

; Emit 4 vertices for edge 2-4
%gl_out_ptr4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr4 %v20
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor24
OpEmitVertex

%gl_out_ptr5 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr5 %v21
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor24
OpEmitVertex

%gl_out_ptr6 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr6 %v22
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor24
OpEmitVertex

%gl_out_ptr7 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr7 %v23
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor24
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; Edge 4-0: compute offset in clip-space (thickness ~ 0.008)
%edge3_x = OpFSub %float %p0x %p4x
%edge3_y = OpFSub %float %p0y %p4y

%edge3_x2 = OpFMul %float %edge3_x %edge3_x
%edge3_y2 = OpFMul %float %edge3_y %edge3_y
%edge3_len2 = OpFAdd %float %edge3_x2 %edge3_y2
%edge3_len = OpSqrt %float %edge3_len2

%neg_edge3_y = OpFNegate %float %edge3_y
%div_x3 = OpFDiv %float %neg_edge3_y %edge3_len
%offset3_x = OpFMul %float %div_x3 %float_008
%div_y3 = OpFDiv %float %edge3_x %edge3_len
%offset3_y = OpFMul %float %div_y3 %float_008

; v0'' = (p4x - ox3, p4y - oy3, p4z, p4w)
%v40_x = OpFSub %float %p4x %offset3_x
%v40_y = OpFSub %float %p4y %offset3_y
%v40 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v40_x %v40_y %p4z %p4w

; v1'' = (p4x + ox3, p4y + oy3, p4z, p4w)
%v41_x = OpFAdd %float %p4x %offset3_x
%v41_y = OpFAdd %float %p4y %offset3_y
%v41 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v41_x %v41_y %p4z %p4w

; v2'' = (p0x - ox3, p0y - oy3, p0z, p0w)
%v42_x = OpFSub %float %p0x %offset3_x
%v42_y = OpFSub %float %p0y %offset3_y
%v42 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v42_x %v42_y %p0z %p0w

; v3'' = (p0x + ox3, p0y + oy3, p0z, p0w)
%v43_x = OpFAdd %float %p0x %offset3_x
%v43_y = OpFAdd %float %p0y %offset3_y
%v43 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v43_x %v43_y %p0z %p0w

; Colors for edge 4-0: c4 and c0
%c4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_input %color_in %int_4
%c4 = OpLoad %v3float %c4_ptr
%c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_input %color_in %int_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr

%sum40 = OpFAdd %v3float %c4 %c0
%edgeColor40 = OpFMul %v3float %sum40 %float_05

; Emit 4 vertices for edge 4-0
%gl_out_ptr8 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr8 %v40
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor40
OpEmitVertex

%gl_out_ptr9 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr9 %v41
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor40
OpEmitVertex

%gl_out_ptr10 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr10 %v42
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor40
OpEmitVertex

%gl_out_ptr11 = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_output %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_ptr11 %v43
OpStore %outColor %edgeColor40
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; End of main
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Notes:
; - This SPIR-V assembly renders three edge quads per input triangle edge (0-2, 2-4, 4-0)
; - Each edge is emitted as a 4-vertex triangle strip to form a thin quad (thickness ~ 0.008)
; - Edge color is the average of endpoint colors: (color[i] + color[j]) / 2
; - The code uses a simplified, clip-space thickness approach (no perspective-correct offset in screen space)
; - UBO at set=0, binding=0 is declared and accessible (not explicitly used for geometry calculations here)

Geometry Shader - Flat-Shaded Triangles (triangle_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (7190 chars)
; SPIR-V geometry shader implementing flat-shaded triangle via adjacency-based input
; Geometry shader requirements observed:
; - OpCapability Geometry
; - OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
; - OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" with interface vars
; - OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
; - OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
; - OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
; - OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

; gl_PerVertex_in and gl_PerVertex_out structs
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position

; Input interface: arrays sized for 6-vertex adjacency (InputTrianglesAdjacency)
; gl_in is provided as a single array of gl_PerVertex_in[6]
%uint6 = OpConstant %uint 6
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint6
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; Per-vertex inputs from vertex shader (arrays of length 6)
%worldPos_arr = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint6
%ptr_in_worldPos = OpTypePointer Input %worldPos_arr
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_worldPos Input

%normal_arr = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint6
%ptr_in_normal = OpTypePointer Input %normal_arr
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_normal Input

%color_arr = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint6
%ptr_in_color = OpTypePointer Input %color_arr
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_color Input

; Output interface variable: per-vertex color to fragment shader
%ptr_out_color = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_color Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Output location gl_Position (per-vertex) via gl_PerVertex_out
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
; We’ll write to gl_out.gl_Position by addressing member 0 of the gl_out struct
; (see Store via OpAccessChain below)

; Uniform UBO (set=0, binding=0) with layout matching test 41 (not used directly here)
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %float 4
%ubo_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v3float %v3float %v4float
OpDecorate %ubo_struct Block
%ubo_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_struct
%ubo = OpVariable %ubo_ptr Uniform

; Decorations for interfaces (locations)
; worldPos, normal, color inputs
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2

; Entry point
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel

OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %outColor

; Execution modes
OpExecutionMode %main Vertex? ; placeholder to ensure validity if some tooling expects a vertex-mode label
OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Constants
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0

%one_f = OpConstant %float 1.0
%zero_f = OpConstant %float 0.0
%f02 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%f08 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%one_third = OpConstant %float 0.333333

; Helper: pointers to inputs
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
; p0, p2, p4 from gl_in
;p0
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %uint_0 %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr
; p2
%p2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %uint_2 %int_0
%p2 = OpLoad %v4float %p2_ptr
; p4
%p4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %uint_4 %int_0
%p4 = OpLoad %v4float %p4_ptr

; Extract xyz from p0, p2, p4
%p0x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 0
%p0y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 1
%p0z = OpCompositeExtract %float %p0 2

%p2x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2 0
%p2y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2 1
%p2z = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2 2

%p4x = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4 0
%p4y = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4 1
%p4z = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4 2

; a = p2 - p0 ; b = p4 - p0
%ax = OpFSub %float %p2x %p0x
%ay = OpFSub %float %p2y %p0y
%az = OpFSub %float %p2z %p0z

%bx = OpFSub %float %p4x %p0x
%by = OpFSub %float %p4y %p0y
%bz = OpFSub %float %p4z %p0z

; cross product N = a x b
; Nx = ay*bz - az*by
%temp1 = OpFMul %float %ay %bz
%temp2 = OpFMul %float %az %by
%Nx = OpFSub %float %temp1 %temp2

; Ny = az*bx - ax*bz
%temp3 = OpFMul %float %az %bx
%temp4 = OpFMul %float %ax %bz
%Ny = OpFSub %float %temp3 %temp4

; Nz = ax*by - ay*bx
%temp5 = OpFMul %float %ax %by
%temp6 = OpFMul %float %ay %bx
%Nz = OpFSub %float %temp5 %temp6

; N vec
%Nvec = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %Nx %Ny %Nz
; Nnorm = normalize(N)
%Nnorm = OpExtInst %v3float %GLSL Normalize %Nvec

; L = normalize(vec3(1,1,1))  -- we can construct directly
%L = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %one_f %one_f %one_f
%dotNL = OpExtInst %float %GLSL Dot %Nnorm %L
%diffuse = OpExtInst %float %GLSL FMax %dotNL %zero_f

; Base color = average of color[0], color[2], color[4]
%color_ptr0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_color %color_in %uint_0
%color0 = OpLoad %v3float %color_ptr0

%color_ptr2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_color %color_in %uint_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color_ptr2

%color_ptr4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_color %color_in %uint_4
%color4 = OpLoad %v3float %color_ptr4

%sum01 = OpFAdd %v3float %color0 %%color2
%sum = OpFAdd %v3float %sum01 %color4
%sum_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %sum %%inv3?  ; we'll compute via 0.333333
%inv3 = %one_third
;base = %sum_scaled

; final color: base * (0.2 + 0.8 * diffuse)
;base components
%base_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %base 0
%base_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %base 1
%base_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %base 2

%mul_diffuse = OpFMul %float %diffuse %f08
%f = OpFAdd %float %f02 % %mul_diffuse

%finalR = OpFMul %float %base_x % %f
%finalG = OpFMul %float %base_y % %f
%finalB = OpFMul %float %base_z % %f
%finalCol = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %finalR %finalG %finalB

; Prepare for output: write 3 vertices (0, 2, 4) with same color
; Vertex 0
OpStore %outColor %finalCol
; gl_Position for first vertex (gl_in[0].gl_Position)
%glOutPos0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %glOutPos0 %p0
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2
OpStore %outColor %finalCol
%glOutPos2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %glOutPos2 %p2
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 4
OpStore %outColor %finalCol
%glOutPos4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %glOutPos4 %p4
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; End of shader

Note: This SPIR-V assembly text is intended to illustrate the required geometry shader structure and the lighting math as specified. Depending on the exact SPIR-V assembler version, some minor syntactic adjustments (such as exact constant names or extended-operand usage) may be needed. If you’d like, I can generate a more conservative, assembler-tested version with minimal optimization-friendly temporaries and explicit OpName decorations.

Test 43: Fragment Shaders (HLSL) Score: 0.00 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing an HLSL pixel (fragment) shader for Vulkan. The shader will be
compiled with glslangValidator (-D flag for HLSL mode) targeting Vulkan 1.0,
then rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader, using Vulkan layout attributes):**
```hlsl
struct PSInput {
[[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0; // world-space position
[[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal : TEXCOORD1; // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
[[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv : TEXCOORD2; // texture coordinates in [0,1]
[[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent : TEXCOORD3; // tangent vector
[[vk::location(4)]] float3 color : TEXCOORD4; // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};
```

**Available constant buffer (set 0, binding 0):**
```hlsl
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
float4x4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
float4x4 view; // offset 64
float4x4 projection; // offset 128
float4 lightPos; // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
float4 cameraPos; // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
float4 params; // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};
```

**Required output:**
```hlsl
float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 // RGBA float, stored as rgba8unorm
```

**HLSL requirements:**
- Use Vulkan-specific attributes: `[[vk::location(N)]]` for inputs, `[[vk::binding(B, S)]]` for UBO
- Entry point must be named `main`
- Return type is `float4` with `SV_Target0` semantic
- Standard HLSL intrinsics are available: normalize, dot, reflect, pow, max, clamp, lerp, etc.
- Use `mul()` for matrix-vector operations if needed

**Write ONLY the complete HLSL source code.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the shader source.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (float4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;

    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;

    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

{
    return float4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Normal to RGB

View HLSL (618 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    float3 n = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 color = n * 0.5f + 0.5f;
    return float4(color, 1.0f);
}

HLSL Shader - Vertex Color

View HLSL (1043 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0   // RGBA float, stored as rgba8unorm
{
    // Pass through per-vertex color directly with alpha = 1.0
    return float4(input.color, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Lambertian Diffuse

View HLSL (976 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0)
{
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;     // (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;    // (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;         // unused
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float d = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float3 col = float3(d, d, d);
    return float4(col, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Phong Specular

View HLSL (1044 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4   lightPos;    // world-space position
    float4   cameraPos;   // world-space position
    float4   params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    // Phong lighting in world space
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float3 R = reflect(-L, N);

    float diffuse  = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float specular = pow(max(dot(R, V), 0.0), 32.0);

    float intensity = 0.2 + 0.5 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;
    intensity = saturate(intensity);

    return float4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Blinn-Phong

View HLSL (1222 chars)
[[vk::binding(0,0)]] cbuffer UBO
{
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;     // (5,5,5,1)
    float4 cameraPos;    // (0,0,3,1)
    float4 params;       // (0,0.5,0,0)
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    // Normalize the interpolated normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Light direction (world space)
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // View direction (world space)
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Half-vector
    float3 H = normalize(L + V);

    // Blinn-Phong components
    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float specular = pow(max(dot(N, H), 0.0), 64.0);

    // Grayscale intensity: 0.1 ambient + 0.6*diffuse + 0.8*specular
    float intensity = 0.1 + 0.6 * diffuse + 0.8 * specular;
    intensity = saturate(intensity);

    return float4(intensity, intensity, intensity, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Rim Lighting

View HLSL (1316 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;   // (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;  // (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;     // (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    // Normalize world-space normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Light and view directions in world space
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float3 V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Diffuse term
    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // Rim term as specified: rim = (1 - max(dot(N,V),0))^3
    float rim = pow(max(1.0 - dot(N, V), 0.0), 3.0);

    // Base color modulated by diffuse
    float3 baseColor = float3(0.2, 0.3, 0.8) * (0.3 + 0.5 * diffuse);

    // Rim tint
    float3 rimTint = float3(1.0, 0.8, 0.5);
    float3 rimColor = rimTint * rim;

    float3 color = baseColor + rimColor;
    color = saturate(color);

    return float4(color, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Toon Shading

View HLSL (1243 chars)
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]] cbuffer UBO : register(b0)
{
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;     // (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;    // (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;         // (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    // Normal in world space (normalize to ensure unit length)
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Light direction from fragment position to light position
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    // Lambertian diffuse
    float d = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // Toon shading bands: thresholds 0.75, 0.5, 0.25 with values 1.0, 0.7, 0.4, 0.2
    float band;
    if (d >= 0.75)
        band = 1.0;
    else if (d >= 0.5)
        band = 0.7;
    else if (d >= 0.25)
        band = 0.4;
    else
        band = 0.2;

    // Apply band to vertex color
    float3 col = input.color * band;

    return float4(col, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Checkerboard

Approach: HLSL fragment shader for Vulkan (GLSLang in HLSL mode)

View HLSL (1534 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    // Lambertian shading
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // 8x8 UV checkerboard parity-based color
    float2 uv8 = input.uv * 8.0;
    int ix = (int)floor(uv8.x);
    int iy = (int)floor(uv8.y);
    int parity = (ix + iy) & 1; // 0 -> even, 1 -> odd
    float base = (parity == 0) ? 0.9 : 0.2;
    float3 baseColor = float3(base, base, base);

    // Apply Lambertian shading factor (0.5 + 0.5*diffuse)
    float shading = 0.5 + 0.5 * diffuse;
    float3 color = baseColor * shading;

    return float4(color, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Horizontal Stripes

View HLSL (1001 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0)
{
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float NdotL = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float lambert = 0.4f + 0.6f * NdotL;

    const float PI = 3.14159f;
    float s = sin(input.uv.y * PI * 16.0f);
    float t = step(0.0f, s);

    float3 blue = float3(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.9f);
    float3 red  = float3(0.9f, 0.1f, 0.1f);
    float3 stripeColor = lerp(blue, red, t);

    float3 color = stripeColor * lambert;
    return float4(color, 1.0f);
}

HLSL Shader - Polka Dots

View HLSL (1281 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    // 6x6 UV polka-dot pattern
    const float cells = 6.0;
    float2 uvCell = input.uv * cells;
    float2 uvLocal = uvCell - floor(uvCell); // local within cell [0,1)
    float2 toCenter = uvLocal - float2(0.5, 0.5);
    float dist = length(toCenter);

    const float radius = 0.3;
    float inDot = (dist <= radius) ? 1.0 : 0.0;

    float3 dotColor = float3(1.0, 0.8, 0.0);
    float3 bgColor  = float3(0.1, 0.1, 0.3);
    float3 color = lerp(bgColor, dotColor, saturate(inDot));

    // Lambertian shading
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float shading = 0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse;

    float3 finalColor = color * shading;
    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Hemisphere Lighting

View HLSL (1660 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    // Normalize world-space normal
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);

    // Hemisphere blend factor based on N.y
    float t = N.y * 0.5 + 0.5;
    t = clamp(t, 0.0, 1.0);

    // Hemisphere colors
    float3 skyColor   = float3(0.4, 0.6, 1.0);
    float3 groundColor= float3(0.3, 0.15, 0.05);

    // Ambient color blended by hemisphere factor
    float3 ambient = lerp(groundColor, skyColor, t);

    // Diffuse term: 0.3 * d where d = max(dot(N, L), 0)
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float d = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);

    // Combine ambient with a small diffuse contribution
    float3 color = ambient + 0.3 * d;

    // Clamp to [0,1] per channel
    color = clamp(color, 0.0, 1.0);

    return float4(color, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Y-Gradient

View HLSL (738 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    float t = input.worldPos.y * 0.5 + 0.5;
    t = clamp(t, 0.0, 1.0);

    float3 bottom = float3(0.1, 0.4, 0.1);
    float3 top    = float3(1.0, 1.0, 1.0);
    float3 col = lerp(bottom, top, t);

    return float4(col, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Fog Effect

Approach: HLSL shader for Vulkan (GLSLang HLSL mode)

View HLSL (1147 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;     // (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;    // (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;       // (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0
{
    // Lambertian shading
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);
    float NdotL = max(dot(N, L), 0.0);
    float lambert = 0.3 + 0.7 * NdotL;

    float3 baseColor = float3(0.8, 0.2, 0.2) * lambert;

    // Distance-based fog
    float dist = length(input.worldPos - cameraPos.xyz);
    float fogFactor = clamp((dist - 1.5) / 3.0, 0.0, 1.0);
    const float3 fogColor = float3(0.7, 0.7, 0.8);

    float3 finalColor = lerp(baseColor, fogColor, fogFactor);

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Gooch Shading

View HLSL (1319 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Gooch shading: cool to warm based on lighting
    float3 N = normalize(input.normal);
    float3 L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - input.worldPos);

    float t = dot(N, L) * 0.5 + 0.5;
    t = saturate(t);

    float3 cool = float3(0.2, 0.2, 0.75);
    float3 warm = float3(0.7, 0.7, 0.4);

    float3 gooch = lerp(cool, warm, t);

    // Modulate by per-vertex color
    float3 finalColor = gooch * input.color;

    return float4(finalColor, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Mandelbrot Set

View HLSL (1645 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Mandelbrot on UV-mapped plane: c = (uv.x*3-2, uv.y*2-1)
    float cRe = input.uv.x * 3.0 - 2.0;
    float cIm = input.uv.y * 2.0 - 1.0;

    float zr = 0.0;
    float zi = 0.0;

    int iter;
    for (iter = 0; iter < 20; ++iter) {
        float tmp = zr * zr - zi * zi + cRe;
        zi = 2.0 * zr * zi + cIm;
        zr = tmp;
        if ((zr * zr + zi * zi) > 4.0) {
            break;
        }
    }

    int iterations;
    if ((zr * zr + zi * zi) > 4.0) {
        iterations = iter + 1; // number of iterations actually performed
    } else {
        iterations = 20; // did not escape within 20 iterations
    }

    float t = iterations / 20.0;
    float3 color = float3(t, t * 0.5, 1.0 - t);
    return float4(color, 1.0);
}
